programme.title: Best Walks with a View with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: Julia chooses six of her favourite and most accessible family treks from across the UK, in search of the perfect scenic walk that anyone can manage. She begins by heading to one of the most famous landmarks on the Jurassic Coast - Old Harry Rocks in Dorset, which boasts spectacular views towards the Isle of Wight and of the offshore chalk stacks, good opportunities for bird and butterfly watching and a rich variety of wild flowers in spring and summer. There are also miles of golden sandy beaches and a dramatic vista of the bay

First he needs to get his hands on a shrinking ray owned by a rival evil genius, and adopts three orphan girls to help him - but finds that fatherhood brings out his long-buried caring side. Animated comedy, with the voices of Steve Carell, Jason Segel, Russell Brand and Julie Andrews

programme.desc: The teenage wizard is alarmed to learn a dangerous fugitive sorcerer is searching for him. The third in the fantasy adventure series, starring Daniel Radcliffe, Emma Watson, Rupert Grint, Gary Oldman, David Thewlis, Michael Gambon, Robbie Coltrane and Alan Rickman

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire (2005)
programme.desc: Adolescent wizard Harry is unexpectedly chosen to represent Hogwarts School in a prestigious magical tournament, despite being legally too young to enter. Along with charming sixth-year student Cedric Diggory, Harry takes on the champions of two other magical academies visiting the school, facing deadly monsters in a series of death-defying challenges. Meanwhile, the followers of the dreaded Lord Voldemort plot to restore their master to the land of the living. Fourth instalment of the fantasy saga, starring Daniel Radcliffe, Robbie Coltrane, Ralph Fiennes, Michael Gambon, Rupert Grint, Emma Watson, Brendan Gleeson and Robert Pattinson

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter and his friends go on an extended drinking binge in a bid to win a tour of the local brewery - but their bad behaviour lands them in trouble with owner Pawtucket Pat, who bears more than a passing resemblance to Willy Wonka. Animated comedy, with the voice of Seth MacFarlane

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter realises Chris is utterly irresponsible, and tries to rectify matters by getting him a job at the local golf course, hoping he will benefit from being entrusted with regular adult duties. Animated comedy, with the voices of Seth MacFarlane and Seth Green

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Part one of two. Brian is awarded a prestigious job as a sniffer dog for the Quahog police department, only to suffer the embarrassment of becoming addicted to cocaine and referred to a rehabilitation clinic

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: In the 100th episode of the animated comedy, Stan and Francine try to stop Hayley from eloping with her boyfriend by offering a $50,000 reward to anyone stopping them. programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan creates a clone of Steve, and takes the opportunity to challenge Francine to a parenting competition in which they each raise one of the teenagers to determine who has the better child-rearing skills. Meanwhile, Roger tries to find a missing bride and groom in Thailand

programme.title: The Cleveland Show

Meanwhile, Freight Train and Cookie leave Cleveland to house-sit for the weekend, but things go badly wrong when his friends visit

Fourth instalment of the fantasy saga, starring Daniel Radcliffe, Robbie Coltrane, Ralph Fiennes, Michael Gambon, Rupert Grint, Emma Watson, Brendan Gleeson and Robert Pattinson

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: The latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire (2005)
programme.desc: Adolescent wizard Harry is unexpectedly chosen to represent Hogwarts School in a prestigious magical tournament, despite being legally too young to enter. Along with charming sixth-year student Cedric Diggory, Harry takes on the champions of two other magical academies visiting the school, facing deadly monsters in a series of death-defying challenges. Meanwhile, the followers of the dreaded Lord Voldemort plot to restore their master to the land of the living. Fourth instalment of the fantasy saga, starring Daniel Radcliffe, Robbie Coltrane, Ralph Fiennes, Michael Gambon, Rupert Grint, Emma Watson, Brendan Gleeson and Robert Pattinson

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix (2007)
programme.desc: The young wizard struggles to convince his fellow sorcerers that the evil Lord Voldemort has returned to life. When Hogwarts headmaster Dumbledore is ousted in favour of a sadistic replacement, Harry realises he must take matters into his own hands, uniting his fellow pupils to form a secret army and training them for the inevitable confrontation to come. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Daniel Radcliffe, Emma Watson, Rupert Grint, Gary Oldman, Michael Gambon and Alan Rickman

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: The latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix (2007)
programme.desc: The young wizard struggles to convince his fellow sorcerers that the evil Lord Voldemort has returned to life. When Hogwarts headmaster Dumbledore is ousted in favour of a sadistic replacement, Harry realises he must take matters into his own hands, uniting his fellow pupils to form a secret army and training them for the inevitable confrontation to come. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Daniel Radcliffe, Emma Watson, Rupert Grint, Gary Oldman, Michael Gambon and Alan Rickman

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Lois shows Meg how to have fun during a spring break at the beach, while Peter rashly takes out a loan and buys a boat, determined to try his hand at commercial fishing

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: The Griffins visit Lois's pregnant sister and help deliver her baby, who catches them off guard by putting in a premature appearance. Exhilarated, they decide to try for another child of their own - but Stewie is horrified and tries every trick in the book to prevent conception

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter and his friends go on an extended drinking binge in a bid to win a tour of the local brewery - but their bad behaviour lands them in trouble with owner Pawtucket Pat, who bears more than a passing resemblance to Willy Wonka. Animated comedy, with the voice of Seth MacFarlane

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter realises Chris is utterly irresponsible, and tries to rectify matters by getting him a job at the local golf course, hoping he will benefit from being entrusted with regular adult duties. Animated comedy, with the voices of Seth MacFarlane and Seth Green

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Part one of two. Brian is awarded a prestigious job as a sniffer dog for the Quahog police department, only to suffer the embarrassment of becoming addicted to cocaine and referred to a rehabilitation clinic

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: In the 100th episode of the animated comedy, Stan and Francine try to stop Hayley from eloping with her boyfriend by offering a $50,000 reward to anyone stopping them. The entire town takes up the offer, including Steve and Roger under the alias Wheels and the Legman. Meanwhile, tragedy strikes at Langley Falls when 100 characters are killed off

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan creates a clone of Steve, and takes the opportunity to challenge Francine to a parenting competition in which they each raise one of the teenagers to determine who has the better child-rearing skills. Meanwhile, Roger tries to find a missing bride and groom in Thailand

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: An outbreak of headlice at school forces Rallo to cut off his beloved Afro, and when the other kids make fun of him, Cleveland Jr steps in to look after his little brother. Meanwhile, Freight Train and Cookie leave Cleveland to house-sit for the weekend, but things go badly wrong when his friends visit

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Donna is annoyed when Cleveland and Cookie spend time with members of the Silver Sunset Society after they are mistaken for husband and wife. Meanwhile, Rallo steals chocolate from a street vendor, but tries to put the blame on Cleveland Junior when he is caught

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The final four cook for club goers who have taken over Hell's Kitchen. Dinner service gives each of the chefs a chance to run the pass, but Gordon is out to sabotage them

programme.title: Iain Stirling's CelebAbility
programme.desc: Iain Stirling is joined by new team captain Scarlett Moffatt as three friends take on celebrities Darren Harriott, David Potts, Lilah Parsons and Chris Ramsey

programme.title: Totally Bonkers Guinness World Records
programme.desc: Matt Edmonds narrates another selection of some of the most incredible and peculiar records, including the most kicks to the head in a minute and the fastest balloon-modelling. Plus, six motorcyclists enter the Globe of Death

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Nick is frustrated by Gail's dislike of Leanne. Hayley is thrilled when Alma invites her to her home. Leanne urges Nick to tell Gail they are married

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Leanne assures Nick that she does not regret marrying him. Curly learns that Hayley's father has died. Des is startled when Samantha packs her bags

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak finally agrees to a church do for Belle. Scott presses Mandy for info about Kelly and Roy. Bernice confesses all her plans to Mandy and Tricia

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak is not pleased that the rest of the Dingles want Paddy as godfather. Roy plans to propose to Kelly. Donna and Andy make up at school

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A relative brings important news, and Nick is puzzled when Kate seems less than pleased to see her. Meanwhile, a wedding is thrown into confusion by a family death. Rural police drama, starring Nick Berry and Niamh Cusack

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid dodges a stage performance, only to end up sorting out props and scenery. Classic comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: One of Stan's colleagues is about to marry the Inspector's niece - but first he has to survive the stag night. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: The Annual Busmen's Ball arrives, and Jack arranges a stripper as part of the entertainment. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant

programme.title: Carry On Cowboy (1966)
programme.desc: Notorious outlaw the Rumpo Kid runs riot in lawless Stodge City. A local judge sends for someone to clean up the town - a summons taken literally by a timid English sanitation expert who becomes the new sheriff. Comedy Western, starring Jim Dale, Sid James, Charles Hawtrey, Kenneth Williams, Bernard Bresslaw and Joan Sims

programme.title: Carry On Doctor (1967)
programme.desc: A popular doctor is sacked after a misunderstanding ruins his reputation, prompting the furious patients to stage a revolt against the luckless medic's strait-laced superiors. Meanwhile, the hospital head has his own problems after becoming the unlikely romantic target of a strict matron. Comedy, with Frankie Howerd, Jim Dale, Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Matron (1972)
programme.desc: A wily thief gathers a band of crooks for a plot to break into a maternity hospital and steal the supply of contraceptive pills. One of the gang gets the lie of the land by disguising himself as a nurse, but the hypochondriac head doctor and formidable matron prove constant obstacles to the heist. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Cruising (1962)
programme.desc: The captain of a cruise ship bound for the Mediterranean is less than impressed when five of his regular shipmates are replaced at the last minute. Despite their best efforts to earn his respect and an eagerness to please, the new recruits seem doomed to cause chaos whatever they do. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Liz Fraser and Kenneth Connor

programme.title: Carry On Behind (1975)
programme.desc: Professors Ronald Crump and Anna Vooshka embark on an archaeological dig, but find their efforts disrupted by the saucy shenanigans of a motley bunch of holiday-makers in the neighbouring caravan park. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Elke Sommer, Joan Sims, Windsor Davies, Kenneth Connor and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Carry On Screaming (1966)
programme.desc: A sinister boffin, his sultry sister and two genetic misfits kidnap innocent women from spooky Hocomb Woods and turn them into mannequins - but two dim-witted detectives look set to throw a spanner in the works. Comedy horror, starring Kenneth Williams, Fenella Fielding, Harry H Corbett, Charles Hawtrey, Jim Dale, Joan Sims and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks, Devlin and Chandler investigate after a man is found badly beaten in a park. They discover the victim, Roland Kirk - who lives in a nearby camper van - had many enemies in the community, but nobody is willing to talk. The case then takes a decisive turn when a local man capitulates after being arrested and points the finger at architect Harry Morgan, whose son had recently turned against him and aligned himself with Kirk. Kevin McNally guest stars, with Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Harriet Walter

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: On doctor's orders, the dapper Belgian sleuth visits Brighton for what he hopes will be a relaxing holiday, but it leads to one of the most absorbing cases he has ever faced - the disappearance of a cache of jewels. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Hermione Norris, Philip Jackson and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: The Danish Girl (2015)
programme.desc: Artist Gerda Wegener unveils a portrait of her husband Einar dressed as a woman in 1920s Copenhagen. Einar realises that the woman in the painting is his true identity, and decides to become one of the first people to undergo sex reassignment surgery. Period drama based on David Ebershoff's novel inspired by the true story of artist Lili Elbe, starring Eddie Redmayne and an Oscar-winning Alicia Vikander

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan's plans for a romantic day at home are thwarted by Arthur's ramshackle motorbike, which unexpectedly breaks down on him. Comedy, with Reg Varney

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.title: Bugsy Malone (1976)
programme.desc: Alan Parker's slapstick musical comedy, featuring a cast composed entirely of children and following a war between rival gangsters in 1920s New York - fought with custard pies and cream-firing Tommy guns. When a slick mobster acquires devastating new weapons, his arch rival enlists the aid of a small-time chancer to steal them. Starring Scott Baio, Florrie Dugger and John Cassisi, with Jodie Foster in an early appearance

programme.title: Carry On Loving (1970)
programme.desc: A couple who run a dating agency find themselves inundated with customers, and end up arranging a selection of very unlikely matches - while also contending with their own marital difficulties. Comedy, starring Sid James, Hattie Jacques, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Bernard Bresslaw, Joan Sims and Terry Scott

programme.title: Carry On Girls (1973)
programme.desc: The council of a seaside town is in dire need of a means to attract tourists to its resort, so announces a beauty contest. While the conniving organiser plots a series of publicity stunts, an outraged feminist group plans to sabotage the event. Comedy, starring Sid James, June Whitfield, Joan Sims, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Bresslaw and Peter Butterworth

programme.title: Carry On Doctor (1967)
programme.desc: A popular doctor is sacked after a misunderstanding ruins his reputation, prompting the furious patients to stage a revolt against the luckless medic's strait-laced superiors. Meanwhile, the hospital head has his own problems after becoming the unlikely romantic target of a strict matron. Comedy, with Frankie Howerd, Jim Dale, Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Cleo (1964)
programme.desc: A captured Briton is mistaken for a heroic swordsman and promoted to the Roman Royal Guard, with orders to protect Julius Caesar. But the last thing he and the fated emperor expect is an assassination attempt from within Caesar's own circle of friends. Comedy, starring Amanda Barrie, Kenneth Williams, Sid James, Kenneth Connor, Jim Dale, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Captain Hastings is staying with friends when wealthy heiress Mrs Inglethorp is murdered. He calls in Hercule Poirot to help him solve the baffling crime, which has the whole household under suspicion. Whodunit, starring David Suchet as the Belgian sleuth, with Hugh Fraser, Pauline Moran, Anthony Calf and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A planning dispute leads to murder after a stalwart in the Midsomer Conservation Society suspects her neighbours are involved in a money-making development scam. Political wrangling, burglaries and sexual liaisons abound in picturesque Great Pelfe as Barnaby and Jones investigate. Guest starring Hugo Speer (Bleak House), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: A housewife found choked to death in her own home marks the third strangulation in a month, setting Oxford police on edge. As a manhunt begins in search of a murderer targeting married women, Endeavour looks into the origin of the silk stocking used to kill the latest victim, tracing the garment to its sole supplier in the city. However, as the suspect list narrows and the culprit stalks his prey with increasing desperation, Morse and Thursday find their private lives turned upside down and miss a deeper tragedy unfolding

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: An arson attack on a Turkish social club leaves 17 people dead and Brooks, Devlin and Chandler fearing the crime was racially motivated. They uncover a trail of false identities, but face opposition from a respected barrister when they need to remove a key piece of evidence from a suspect's leg. Meanwhile, Steel is forced to confront one of his oldest friends. Guest starring Charles Kay, with Bradley Walsh and Jamie Bamber

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack are chosen to go on a training course. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: A 999 call is heard, Mandy confronts Paul, and Liv pieces everything together

programme.title: Carry On Cruising (1962)
programme.desc: The captain of a cruise ship bound for the Mediterranean is less than impressed when five of his regular shipmates are replaced at the last minute. Despite their best efforts to earn his respect and an eagerness to please, the new recruits seem doomed to cause chaos whatever they do. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Liz Fraser and Kenneth Connor

programme.title: Carry On Screaming (1966)
programme.desc: A sinister boffin, his sultry sister and two genetic misfits kidnap innocent women from spooky Hocomb Woods and turn them into mannequins - but two dim-witted detectives look set to throw a spanner in the works. Comedy horror, starring Kenneth Williams, Fenella Fielding, Harry H Corbett, Charles Hawtrey, Jim Dale, Joan Sims and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Carry On Again Doctor (1969)
programme.desc: A disgraced surgeon sets up a clinic in the hope of promoting a supposedly miraculous slimming potion made from secret ingredients discovered on a remote tropical island. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Jim Dale, Barbara Windsor, Charles Hawtrey, Hattie Jacques, Pat Coombs and Joan Sims

programme.title: Carry On Follow That Camel (1967)
programme.desc: A disgraced English gentleman joins the Foreign Legion to restore his honour, and proves himself an unlikely hero. Meanwhile, his naive lost love learns he was innocent, and heads to the desert to bring him home. Comedy, starring Phil Silvers, Jim Dale, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Peter Butterworth, Bernard Bresslaw and Joan Sims

programme.title: Carry On Matron (1972)
programme.desc: A wily thief gathers a band of crooks for a plot to break into a maternity hospital and steal the supply of contraceptive pills. One of the gang gets the lie of the land by disguising himself as a nurse, but the hypochondriac head doctor and formidable matron prove constant obstacles to the heist. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Abroad (1972)
programme.desc: British holiday-makers jet off on a package holiday to the Spanish resort of Elsbels. Unluckily, not only is the hotel short of staff, but it also has no walls, ceilings or entertainment. Further mishaps leave the tourists fuming - until they sample a local punch laced with an aphrodisiac. Comedy, with Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: Kate: The Making of a Modern Queen
programme.desc: Profile of Kate Middleton, how she has changed as person since her marriage to Prince William and what she means for the royal family. From comparatively modest circumstances, the Middleton family could not be more different from the Windsors, yet this is exactly what Prince William wanted - a royal life combined with comfortable marital stability and a continuation of the easier relationship with the British people started by his mother, Princess Diana. The couple met at St Andrew's University in 2001 and after several ups and downs were married at Westminster Abbey in 2011. Contributors include Anthony Seldon, Ferdinand Mount, Catherine Mayer, Emily Nash, Katie Nichol and Sarah Bradford

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's India
programme.desc: Joanna meets the Maharaja of Dungarpur who shows her around his lakeside palace, and a Dalit community in Gujarat, considered to be India's lowest caste. Braving the roads of Mumbai, Joanna takes a ride in the city's only all-female taxi company and visits the Times of India, where her uncle was editor of the paper in the 1930s and 40s. She then overcomes her fear of heights to explore the World One Tower, soon to be Mumbai's tallest luxury residential building

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The last run of the detective drama ended with Lewis (Kevin Whately) starting a new life away from the force, but it seems that peace and quiet doesn't suit him - which is just as well, as newly promoted DI Hathaway (Laurence Fox) is struggling to find a sidekick, and within just four weeks is already on to his second sergeant, DS Lizzie Maddox (Angela Griffin). So, Chief Superintendent Innocent (Rebecca Front) decides to reunite the former partners to look into the murder of a neurosurgeon, a case with potential links to the worlds of animal rights and blood sports. In the first of this two-part story, suspicion falls on glamorous widow Erica (Kara Tointon), but it turns out there are plenty of other people in the victim's inner circle who were driven by fear and loathing

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.desc: A 999 call is heard, Mandy confronts Paul, and Liv pieces everything together

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid dismisses Jean's interest in the daily horoscopes as complete nonsense - but his opinion changes when they start coming true

Comedy horror, starring Kenneth Williams, Fenella Fielding, Harry H Corbett, Charles Hawtrey, Jim Dale, Joan Sims and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Carry On Again Doctor (1969)
programme.desc: A disgraced surgeon sets up a clinic in the hope of promoting a supposedly miraculous slimming potion made from secret ingredients discovered on a remote tropical island. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Jim Dale, Barbara Windsor, Charles Hawtrey, Hattie Jacques, Pat Coombs and Joan Sims

programme.title: Carry On Follow That Camel (1967)
programme.desc: A disgraced English gentleman joins the Foreign Legion to restore his honour, and proves himself an unlikely hero. Meanwhile, his naive lost love learns he was innocent, and heads to the desert to bring him home. Comedy, starring Phil Silvers, Jim Dale, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Peter Butterworth, Bernard Bresslaw and Joan Sims

programme.title: Carry On Matron (1972)
programme.desc: A wily thief gathers a band of crooks for a plot to break into a maternity hospital and steal the supply of contraceptive pills. One of the gang gets the lie of the land by disguising himself as a nurse, but the hypochondriac head doctor and formidable matron prove constant obstacles to the heist. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Abroad (1972)
programme.desc: British holiday-makers jet off on a package holiday to the Spanish resort of Elsbels. Unluckily, not only is the hotel short of staff, but it also has no walls, ceilings or entertainment. Further mishaps leave the tourists fuming - until they sample a local punch laced with an aphrodisiac. Comedy, with Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: Kate: The Making of a Modern Queen
programme.desc: Profile of Kate Middleton, how she has changed as person since her marriage to Prince William and what she means for the royal family. From comparatively modest circumstances, the Middleton family could not be more different from the Windsors, yet this is exactly what Prince William wanted - a royal life combined with comfortable marital stability and a continuation of the easier relationship with the British people started by his mother, Princess Diana. The couple met at St Andrew's University in 2001 and after several ups and downs were married at Westminster Abbey in 2011. Contributors include Anthony Seldon, Ferdinand Mount, Catherine Mayer, Emily Nash, Katie Nichol and Sarah Bradford

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's India
programme.desc: Joanna meets the Maharaja of Dungarpur who shows her around his lakeside palace, and a Dalit community in Gujarat, considered to be India's lowest caste. Braving the roads of Mumbai, Joanna takes a ride in the city's only all-female taxi company and visits the Times of India, where her uncle was editor of the paper in the 1930s and 40s. She then overcomes her fear of heights to explore the World One Tower, soon to be Mumbai's tallest luxury residential building

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The last run of the detective drama ended with Lewis (Kevin Whately) starting a new life away from the force, but it seems that peace and quiet doesn't suit him - which is just as well, as newly promoted DI Hathaway (Laurence Fox) is struggling to find a sidekick, and within just four weeks is already on to his second sergeant, DS Lizzie Maddox (Angela Griffin). So, Chief Superintendent Innocent (Rebecca Front) decides to reunite the former partners to look into the murder of a neurosurgeon, a case with potential links to the worlds of animal rights and blood sports. In the first of this two-part story, suspicion falls on glamorous widow Erica (Kara Tointon), but it turns out there are plenty of other people in the victim's inner circle who were driven by fear and loathing

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: A 999 call is heard, Mandy confronts Paul, and Liv pieces everything together

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Following Norman's complaints about the standard of hospital food, Figgis leads the patients on a hunger strike. Comedy, starring Christopher Strauli and James Bolam

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: The outlaws are attacked by a group of angry Crusaders who believe Robin is a thief. Michael Praed stars

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: A woman is tormented by calls from her supposedly deceased husband, whose lifeless body was pulled from the sea several weeks earlier. While she is admitted to a sanatorium to prevent a nervous breakdown, Templar works on the premise that her spouse may indeed still be alive. Roger Moore and Sylvia Syms star

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: In order to investigate a villain's idea of the perfect crime, Harriet poses as a prostitute and Jim goes up in the world. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad is called in to catch a gunman who has stolen cash from a lock-up. Hard-hitting detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's minicab firm is targeted by saboteurs. However, his partner in the venture is reluctant to involve the police, so he drafts in Terry to act as a driver and help identify the culprits. Needless to say, it soon transpires there is more to the attacks than meets the eye. George Cole, Alfred Burke and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle and Bodie pose as hitmen to infiltrate a mysterious group of hire killers whose targets are all retired government officials, and supposedly no longer of any strategic importance. Adventure, with Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: A lovelorn, smooth-talking minstrel turns to Robin and his outlaw band for help in rescuing his beloved from the Sheriff of Nottingham's clutches. Michael Praed stars

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani introduces live coverage from Lingfield Park and Newcastle, featuring a total of 10 races on the all-weather surfaces. The feature race from Newcastle is the Burradon Stakes. With analysis from Luke Harvey and Adele Mulrennan, betting news from Matt Chapman, commentary from Mark Johnson and reports from Rishi Persad

programme.title: Kelly's Heroes (1970)
programme.desc: A rebellious American soldier fighting in occupied France learns from a captive German officer the whereabouts of a fortune in Nazi gold. Recruiting the aid of three fellow soldiers, he puts together a daring plan to penetrate enemy lines to get their hands on the bullion. Second World War adventure, starring Clint Eastwood, Telly Savalas, Donald Sutherland, Don Rickles and Harry Dean Stanton

programme.title: The A-Team (2010)
programme.desc: Four soldiers are sent on a top-secret mission in Iraq that results in them being imprisoned for a crime they did not commit. When they learn the culprit is trying to sell equipment for producing fake currency, they break out of prison to find both him and evidence of their innocence. Action adventure based on the 1980s TV series, with Liam Neeson, Bradley Cooper, Sharlto Copley and Quinton 'Rampage' Jackson

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Newly promoted Captain Horatio Hornblower sets out to make his mark on the world, and soon manages to capture his first enemy vessel - only to discover a peace treaty has been signed, leaving him down and out, with barely a penny to his name. Fate seems to smile on the ambitious seafarer though, when he discovers the villainous Bonaparte has reneged on the treaty. Drama based on the CS Forester novels, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Robert Lindsay, Paul McGann, Greg Wise, Lorcan Cranitch and Julia Sawalha

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: At the start of a busy Easter weekend of racing, Matt Chapman and the team look ahead to the best racing of the day. Plus, all the news leading up to next week's Grand National

programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from December 1979, featuring Crystal Palace v Nottingham Forest, Middlesbrough v Southampton and Ipswich Town v Manchester City

programme.desc: A look at the prospects of the Netherlands and Slovakia and an interview with England international Trent Alexander-Arnold

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at Soreen, and how a Birmingham firm makes the ear-splitting whistles that have featured in world events for 150 years. Plus, the drum makers that are taking the music world by storm, and discover how a family firm has gone from making chicken coops to satisfying Britain's love affair with sheds

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A look back at memorable stagings of the race from Epsom Downs. Featuring brilliant performances from Shergar to Sea The Stars, plus interviews with personalities from the worlds of sport and entertainment

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Oli Bell presents coverage from Musselburgh, including feature race the 3.35 Queen's Cup. Plus, three races over jumps at Haydock Park. With analysis from Jason Weaver and Mick Fitzgerald, commentary by Richard Hoiles, and reports from Natalie Green

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service (1969)
programme.desc: While on leave, James Bond prevents a young woman - Teresa 'Tracy' Draco - from committing suicide. Her father is Marc-Ange Draco, the head of a powerful crime syndicate who is impressed by Bond and wants him to protect his daughter by marrying her. In exchange, he offers Bond information that will lead him to master criminal and arch-enemy Ernst Stavro Blofeld, who is intent on destroying world peace by means of a lethal virus unless he receives an international amnesty for his crimes. Spy adventure, starring George Lazenby in his only outing as 007, alongside Telly Savalas, Diana Rigg, Gabrielle Ferzetti and Bernard Lee

programme.title: The War Wagon (1967)
programme.desc: A convict is released from prison and swears vengeance on the corrupt mining contractor who took his gold-rich land. On the way, he encounters an old enemy who reveals that the gold from the mine is about to be transported in an armoured stagecoach - and suggests they join forces to steal it. Western, starring John Wayne, Kirk Douglas, Bruce Cabot and Howard Keel

programme.title: The Gauntlet (1977)
programme.desc: A downbeat cop sets out to escort a prostitute across America so she can give evidence in a high-profile Mob trial. However, corrupt officials are bent on ensuring the witness never makes it to court, and subject the pair to a series of attacks. Meanwhile, the mismatched duo's bid to reach their destination alive is complicated by a burgeoning romance. Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Sondra Locke, Bill McKinney and Pat Hingle

Action thriller, starring Sylvester Stallone, John Lithgow, Janine Turner and Michael Rooker

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Discover how traditional Cornish pasties are made on a massive scale, thanks to a team of world class bakers, go behind the scenes at the family firm making top-notch umbrellas for the great and the good, see how vintage style jukeboxes are made with some cutting-edge technology, and learn the secrets of a company whose carpets are laid around the world, from pubs to palaces

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Conclusion. Robin and his outlaw band storm the evil Baron de Belleme's stronghold in a bid to rescue Lady Marion and retrieve the silver arrow. Michael Praed, Anthony Valentine and Judi Trott star

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Robin saves a witch's life and accepts Marion fully into the band of outlaws. Fantasy drama, starring Michael Praed

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Conclusion. Despite his reservations, Hornblower is reluctant to dishonour his bride-to-be by leaving her standing at the altar. However, with the ink barely dry on the marriage certificate, a surprise guest at the wedding breakfast despatches the groom to France on a mission to uncover the whereabouts of a missing sloop and its captain, Bracegirdle. En route, Hornblower rescues two strangers caught in a storm. Historical Navy drama, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Robert Lindsay, Paul McGann and Lorcan Cranitch

programme.title: The Guns of Navarone (1961)
programme.desc: An elite group of Allied soldiers is dispatched to sabotage vital German artillery emplacements, despite the seemingly insurmountable odds and the suspicion there is a traitor in their midst. Oscar-winning Second World War adventure, based on Alistair MacLean's novel, starring Gregory Peck, David Niven, Anthony Quinn, Stanley Baker, Anthony Quayle and Irene Papas

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: James Bond achieves his '00' status and is dispatched on the trail of Le Chiffre, an international criminal financing terrorist organisations around the world. Bond's investigation leads to a casino in Montenegro, where he takes part in a high-stakes poker game in a bid to bankrupt Le Chiffre and put an end to his plans. Spy thriller, directed by Martin Campbell and starring Daniel Craig in his first outing as 007, with Eva Green, Mads Mikkelsen, Judi Dench and Giancarlo Giannini

programme.desc: While on leave, James Bond prevents a young woman - Teresa 'Tracy' Draco - from committing suicide. Her father is Marc-Ange Draco, the head of a powerful crime syndicate who is impressed by Bond and wants him to protect his daughter by marrying her. In exchange, he offers Bond information that will lead him to master criminal and arch-enemy Ernst Stavro Blofeld, who is intent on destroying world peace by means of a lethal virus unless he receives an international amnesty for his crimes. Spy adventure, starring George Lazenby in his only outing as 007, alongside Telly Savalas, Diana Rigg, Gabrielle Ferzetti and Bernard Lee

programme.title: The War Wagon (1967)
programme.desc: A convict is released from prison and swears vengeance on the corrupt mining contractor who took his gold-rich land. On the way, he encounters an old enemy who reveals that the gold from the mine is about to be transported in an armoured stagecoach - and suggests they join forces to steal it. Western, starring John Wayne, Kirk Douglas, Bruce Cabot and Howard Keel

programme.desc: A downbeat cop sets out to escort a prostitute across America so she can give evidence in a high-profile Mob trial. However, corrupt officials are bent on ensuring the witness never makes it to court, and subject the pair to a series of attacks. Meanwhile, the mismatched duo's bid to reach their destination alive is complicated by a burgeoning romance. Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Sondra Locke, Bill McKinney and Pat Hingle

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: The first time they meet, Molly's publisher Xander advises her to incorporate time-travel into her book as he feels that would make it a bigger success. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Joyce pulls up when Carl and Mike are working a drunk-driving checkpoint, and while she throws insults at the two men, Mike is forced to take her into the station. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam upsets Diane by making advances to one of her old college friends who is on the rebound from an unhappy love affair. Starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm angles for promotion by arranging for Diane to date his playboy boss - but neglects to tell her about it beforehand. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon fight over a childhood toy, while Arthur discovers Carrie is buying him an expensive Christmas gift and decides to splash out on something equally costly in return. Comedy, starring Kevin James, Victor Williams and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur becomes convinced he is addicted to nasal spray, while Carrie persuades Doug to see a therapist to help him with his eating habits, with a little too much success

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Martin take pity on Frasier and individually set him up on dates with three women who they believe will sweep him off his feet, but unfortunately things do not go to plan. Comedy, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frederick wins a national spelling competition, but the other entrants' parents claim Frasier helped him by silently mouthing the letters of difficult words - a view shared by the judges. Comedy, guest starring Trevor Einhorn

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Krys have their first gastronomic weekend, and the pressure is on to make sure it runs smoothly. Belinda and Lee are hosting their biggest event so far with music, dancing and a slap-up meal for paying guests from the surrounding towns and villages. However, it seems they might have underestimated the wine requirements of the British contingent. Dick Strawbridge visits Angela and Steve to lend a hand with a precariously dislodged beam holding up the roof of one of their chateau turrets

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Electrician Sam and estate agent Eva meet just hours before buying a property together in Rugby, then have six months to renovate the house and sell it on for a profit. Hosted by Simon O'Brien

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: n Northampton, first hosts cockney duo Shelly and her husband Scott dish up a night full of food that they think nobody will have heard of before. Night two sees Team Texas, Ilyas and his wife Amanda, present a menu of tried and tested food along with a little homegrown southern hospitality. Finally, it's the turn of Sabbi and Ashley to host with an Indo-Caribbean fusion they think is destined to win them the £1,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Tiverton in the West Country to meet petrolhead Roger. Henry finds part of a tornado jet that he wants to turn into a table, while Simon finds a pair of exhaust pipes, which he thinks could become a trendy pair of lamps

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley present the words-and-numbers game, with comedy actor John Thomson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Recently retired Baksho wants to buy a holiday home in the resort of Gran Alacant on Spain's popular Costa Blanca. With a budget of £100,000 and her sister Sukvinder by her side to help, Jasmine Harman sets out to find Baksho the perfect family friendly property

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Summer nears to an end as in Valencia, a couple try pushing their bike business to the next level. Elsewhere, the expat owners of a B&B end their season busier than ever, and two former teachers take on their biggest booking yet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On payment day, Carly from the Juniperlea Inn is keen for Barney to enlighten her on the reasons behind his sleep issues. Barney is in the spotlight again when his payment to Jodie and Enya makes tensions run high. There are plenty of differences to be debated before the winner is announced

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart tracks down and befriends a former Springfield Elementary student after Groundskeeper Willie reveals that he pulled off the 'ultimate prank'. Meanwhile, Marge starts shopping at a natural foods store when members of her mother-and-baby group criticise her refreshments. With the guest voice of Jonah Hill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa accepts an invitation to join a Wiccan coven - but before she can be initiated, Chief Wiggum arrives and arrests the other members on charges of witchcraft. Meanwhile, Homer befriends local hillbilly Cletus, eager to share his plentiful supply of illegal moonshine liquor

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Toby is worried about his girlfriend Cleo when she starts acting strangely, and the walls start to close in on Cher as her family hunt for the truth

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A look back at some favourite chocolate-based investigations, including Kate Quilton's trip to a cocoa co-operative in Ghana to get to grips with the raw ingredient. Plus, Matt Tebbutt heads to one of the UK's largest chocolate factories to find out what makes white chocolate white and gets the inside story on After Eights - learning how the minty fondant in the middle remains gooey

programme.title: Grayson's Art Club
programme.desc: Grayson and Philippa Perry welcome illusionist Derren Brown, who talks about his love of painting. Comedian Alex Horne creates a unique response to the theme of the week - travel. Art Club meets Liverpudlian artist Chila Kumari Singh Burman, whose recent installation transformed the front of Tate Britain into a celebration of bright lights and swirling colour. Grayson and Derren choose their favourite artworks from this week's submissions and some of the special guests from throughout the series return for a heart-warming finale

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, including Line of Duty, The Great Celebrity Bake Off for SU2C, The Flight Attendant, Teen First Dates, The Circle, Remarkable Places to Eat, This Morning featuring Matt Hancock, and the News on the Suez Canal

programme.title: The Circle
programme.desc: Series assessing the impact of social media, in which individuals from all walks of life compete in a popularity contest to win a cash prize. Twists and turns abound as the players compete to be the most popular and win the £100,000 prize pot

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Six-foot gym owner and ex-military man Richard is paired with Emilia. Despite his muscular appearance, he is a sensitive soul who loves musicals and Harry Potter, and his Asperger's leaves him unable to read what others are thinking, so mid-date he is forced to ask Emilia how he is doing. Meanwhile, 40-year-old hotelier Andy arrives at Vesuvius for his first ever date with a man, 37-year-old bouncer Joseph, and police officer Angie hooks up with car salesman Tom, who is determined to leave his stereotypical lad image behind

programme.title: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates (2016)
programme.desc: Hard-partying brothers Mike and Dave place an online advertisement to find the perfect 'wholesome' dates for their sister's wedding in Hawaii. Unfortunately, their efforts to snare respectable women fall flat when wayward best friends Tatiana and Alice see an opportunity for a debauched free holiday and concoct a plan to deceive the siblings. Comedy, starring Zac Efron, Anna Kendrick, Adam Devine and Aubrey Plaza

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay gives his advice to Paul Bazzini, an award-winning chef from New York who now owns a restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Paul confesses he has lost his passion for food and is struggling to keep up with the business, a situation that seems evident to other members of staff, his wife and customers

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition heads to Manchester, where battling it out for the £1,000 cash prize are part-time DJ Dom, 35-year old barber Danny, trainee barrister Sasha, nurse Katherine and goth Maria. In the first edition, DJ Dom kicks off the week serving up a menu inspired by the 1990s 'Madchester' music scene

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee barrister Sasha hosts the second night in Manchester, where she hopes to impress her guests with a Chinese-Pakistani fusion menu. Meanwhile, fellow contestant Maria reveals more about her love of gothic culture, and Danny discusses his soon-to-be-written autobiography

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nurse Katherine hosts the third dinner party in Manchester, and she opts for a simple menu of a smoked salmon with horseradish cream starter, and a chorizo and chickpea main course. At the table, direct questioning and some extraordinary revelations cause some of the guests to feel uncomfortable

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barber Danny hosts the fourth night of the competition in Manchester, and decides on an evening of Bulgarian cuisine as a homage to his wife. His party ends with some Bulgarian language lessons that bemuse fellow diners Dom and Maria

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final night in Manchester and glamorous goth Maria is hoping to wow her guests with her twist on Asian cuisine. Some of the guests are feeling a little uneasy that the host will impart her love of vampire culture upon her menu, but the blood-free dishes even manage to impress daddy's girl Sasha. However, an avant-garde transgender dancer creates a stir, and at one point it seems possible that Maria has bitten off more than she can chew

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: Best friends from Glasgow and a father and son from Birmingham start off with £100,000 and must avoid wrong answers or bundles of their cash will fall through trapdoors

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp competes in the Something New from Something Old competition at the Royal Wales Show, creating vintage paper jewellery, but finds herself up against stiff competition

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is caught in a battle of wills between Sheldon and Penny, while Leonard tries to reignite his long-distance relationship with Priya, who has moved back to India. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard inadvertently gives the impression he is attracted to Amy when he accompanies her to a colleague's wedding. Meanwhile, Howard tries to persuade Bernadette they should live with his mother after getting married and suggests a trial run of the arrangement over the weekend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj feels upset about not being in a relationship, so Penny sets out to find a date and introduces him to a girl he can actually talk to. They hit it off, but when it becomes apparent he has been buying her expensive gifts, his friends suspect she is only interested in his wealth

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns hires a hard-working, conscientious new employee, who takes an instant dislike to the slobbish Homer and sets about trying to humiliate him. Meanwhile, Bart buys an abandoned factory for a dollar at a government auction and gives Milhouse the job of nightwatchman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Troy McClure hosts three spin-off segments, transplanting characters from the show into new situations and locations, including Chief Wiggum's attempt to make his name as a private investigator, ably assisted by streetwise sidekick Principal Skinner, alias 'Skinny Boy'

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge force Bart to enrol in a military academy and Lisa unwisely follows him. Once in her own barracks she is snubbed by the other cadets - but receives unexpected help from Bart to tackle the assault course. Featuring the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart is knocked down by Mr Burns' car, Homer and lawyer Lionel Hutz see a chance to take advantage of Springfield's richest man by making a lucrative compensation claim

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer eats a poisonous fish and fears he has only 24 hours to live. As the minutes tick by, he embarks on a frantic race to put his affairs in order and accomplish everything he ever wanted to do but never did. With the guest voices of Larry King and George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart drives Lisa to distraction on a school trip, tormenting her until she takes out a restraining order forbidding him to come within 20ft of her. Just to be on the safe side, she uses a pole to make sure he keeps his distance. Meanwhile, Grampa is hurt in an incident involving a garden gnome

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Selma realises her hopes of ever bearing a child are diminishing and flies to China to adopt a baby. Asked to fill in her husband's name on the application, she pretends to be married to Homer - but the company co-ordinator (guest star Lucy Liu) sees through the deception. Also featuring the voices of Robert Wagner and David Silverman

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: A dangerous pride of lions at Sibuya Game Reserve needs to be moved after killing and eating some poachers, and elephants and a meerkat take part in a unique experiment

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, married couple Leanne and Senol start things off with a feast of Turkish food, which hits the spot for fun-loving Paul and his partner Verity, though Paul's love of Hawaiian shirts doesn't go down well with Catrin and Josh, who don't like the hosts' meaty main course either. On day two Catrin and Josh attempt some Welsh fine dining, but the complicated dessert fails to live up to its billing. Finally, Paul and Verity get a turn to impress with their version of good pub grub

programme.title: Live Heineken Champions Cup Rugby Union
programme.desc: Wasps v Clermont-Auvergne (Kick-off 12.30pm). Lee McKenzie presents coverage of the last-16 match at the Ricoh Arena in Coventry. Wasps are two-time winners of this prestigious competition, while Clermont are desperate to lift the trophy having fallen at the last hurdle more than once, losing in three finals. A place in the quarter-finals against Munster or Toulouse awaits the winners. Commentary by Miles Harrison, Jamie Heaslip and Danielle Waterman, with analysis by Jack Willis and Chris Ashton

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Hillcroft in Torquay, where Martyn and Elaine Flint hope their lovingly decorated, adults-only B&B will prove a hit with their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to the Bear and Swan in Chew Magna in Somerset, where Sam Wilkins and Henry Russell hope to impress with the five-star rooms above their country pub

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Guesthouse East in Eastbourne, where Tony and Lisa Partridge hope to impress their guests with their family friendly B&B

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jorge Mesquita plays host at the Shirley B&B, Bournemouth, where he believes the guests will be impressed by his power showers and hopes a go-karting contest will help him win

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jorge Mesquita of the Shirley B&B is taken ill, so the remaining B&B'ers fight it out for the prized plaque as they meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Harry and Briony Anscombe, who have decided to move from London to Cornwall with their three young children and begin building work on an ambitious house, inspired by American modernist properties. With a budget of just £400,000, Harry opts to project manage himself, paying local builders by the hour, but his lack of experience in construction proves to be problematic

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Queen's Lost Family
programme.desc: Prince George makes a love match and marries the glamorous Princess Marina of Greece and Denmark, while Henry gives up the married Beryl Markham and also makes a suitable marriage. Edward, meanwhile, brings married American divorcee Wallis Simpson to George and Marina's pre-wedding party at Buckingham Palace, scandalising his parents. Not long after George V's Silver Jubilee celebrations, a unifying event for the nation, the King dies and Edward inherits the throne

programme.title: The Windsors: Inside the Royal Dynasty
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the early days of Elizabeth II's reign. The young queen takes her first steps as Queen, but finds herself torn between old tradition and those, like her husband, who want to modernise the monarchy

programme.title: BlacKkKlansman (2018)
programme.desc: During the 1970s, Ron Stallworth, the first African-American police officer to serve in the Colorado Springs Police Department, attempts to infiltrate the local Ku Klux Klan branch with the assistance of Jewish cop Flip Zimmerman. Spike Lee's Bafta and Oscar-winning drama based on a true story, starring John David Washington and Adam Driver

programme.title: Eye in the Sky (2015)
programme.desc: Colonel Katherine Powell's mission to wipe out a terrorist cell in Kenya is complicated when a girl enters the blast radius of the intended drone strike. Powell has to decide between sacrificing the girl's life or letting the terrorists flee to carry out more atrocities. Thriller, starring Helen Mirren, Alan Rickman and Aaron Paul

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. It's the grand opening of Trish's dance school at Hollyoaks High, and its success becomes more important than ever when one of her dance rivals turns up

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: A couple from Lockerbie and soon-to-be in-laws from Liverpool play Davina McCall's quiz in which contestants lose some, or all, of the prize money with each wrong answer

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The group visits Girona, Spain, where Brendan tries to educate the tourists in the art of goat-herding before they indulge in thrills and spills on some off-road Segways

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits the world's largest jelly bean producers to discover what they are made of instead of gelatine, and Matt Tebbutt finds out why maple syrup is so expensive

programme.title: Escape from Planet Earth (2013)
programme.desc: A heroic alien space explorer travels to Earth in response to a distress call. When he ends up being captured by the military and imprisoned in the infamous Area 51, it falls to his timid, nerdy brother to save him. Animated sci-fi comedy, with the voices of Rob Corddry, Brendan Fraser and Sarah Jessica Parker

programme.title: Escape from Planet Earth (2013)
programme.desc: A heroic alien space explorer travels to Earth in response to a distress call. When he ends up being captured by the military and imprisoned in the infamous Area 51, it falls to his timid, nerdy brother to save him. Animated sci-fi comedy, with the voices of Rob Corddry, Brendan Fraser and Sarah Jessica Parker

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's old adversary Wil Wheaton returns and invites everyone to a house-warming party. Leonard is eager to go, but Sheldon threatens to shun him if he attends. However, he soon changes his mind when he finds out that Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Brent Spiner will also be there

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's mother comes to visit and woos the gang, but he cannot help feeling jealous of all the attention she is receiving - until a bout of illness lays him low, and he suddenly sees the benefits of having her around. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard has doubts about his feelings for Priya when he kisses a girl he meets in the comic-book store, while the rest of the friends play pranks on Sheldon in celebration of Halloween. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer moves into a camper van parked in the backyard, while Marge retains sole residence of the family home, prompting Bart to take swift action in a bid to reunite them. Unfortunately, his plan entails a perilous drive along the freeway - which culminates in a disaster on board a Turkish container ship

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge tries to bring culture to Springfield by asking architect Frank Gehry (guest starring as himself) to construct a concert hall. However, none of the locals is interested, so Mr Burns decides to turn the disused building into a prison, where Homer soon finds himself confined

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Katherine Parkinson talks about her play, Sitting. Rick Edwards chats about his TV series, River Hunters. Nish Kumar has the latest on his forthcoming tour, Control. Ray Mears discusses his book, We Are Nature. Tim Key talks about the TV series Pls Like. And there's music from James Arthur

programme.title: A Taste of Italy
programme.desc: Nisha Katona explores the historic city of Campobasso, where she learns about knitted cheese and samples pork and hot spices with smoked mash potato with a local chef

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas hosts as TV presenter Stacey Dooley, Little Mix's Jade Thirlwall, comedian Katherine Ryan and internet influencer KSI show off their baking skills. They serve up cocktail-flavoured fondant fancies, have their knowledge of pastry tested in the technical and in the showstopper are asked to create a scene showing something they cannot live without - all from biscuit and meringue. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The TV breaks down, leaving everyone at a loose end - so Marge decides to fill the time by telling Bart and Lisa how she met and fell in love with Homer. With the guest voice of Jon Lovitz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is shocked by Homer's ploy to get illegal cable TV, fearing he is destined to go to hell for breaking one of the Ten Commandments - thou shalt not steal. Animated antics, with the voices of Yeardley Smith and Dan Castellaneta

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes an attempt to give Cupid a helping hand by arranging a date between Principal Skinner and Marge's man-hungry sister Selma. Animated comedy, with the voices of Dan Castellaneta and Harry Shearer

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Grease (1978)
programme.desc: Rebellious American teenager Danny falls for innocent Australian girl Sandy during the summer holidays, but when he later finds out she is a new student at his school, he risks losing her love by trying to act cool in front of his friends. Romantic musical set in the 1950s, starring John Travolta, Olivia Newton-John, Stockard Channing, Jeff Conaway, Didi Conn and Sid Caesar

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: A historic section of the East Fife coastal railway is prepared for reopening in a celebration of the golden age of steam. However, the presence of beavers living beneath the line threatens to cause disastrous flooding. Trainee conductor Melanie attempts to join the ranks of Scotland's train crew, and the piper and dancers of the Atholl Highlanders perform a tartan takeover at King's Cross station

programme.title: Queen Elizabeth and the Spy in the Palace
programme.desc: The story of Anthony Blunt, royal appointed art expert and KGB spy, who worked as Surveyor of the Queen's Pictures for 27 years. The programme examines how he was previously employed by George VI to loot art treasures from Germany in the aftermath of the Second World War, and that despite Blunt's protestations of loyalty to the monarchy, classified documents have since revealed that he provided damaging information about the royal family to his Soviet employers

programme.title: The Circle
programme.desc: Popularity contest in which individuals from all walks of life compete to win a cash prize They will all live in one modern block, but separately in individual apartments, interacting with one another exclusively through a bespoke voice-activated social media platform called 'The Circle'

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: Heineken Champions Cup Rugby: The Big Tackle
programme.desc: Ed Jackson is joined by Topsy Ojo to present action from the round-of-16 fixtures, including Scarlets v Sale Sharks, Wasps v Clermont Auvergne and Exeter Chiefs v Lyon

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Florida to help the owners of Fleming, a Danish restaurant in Miami. A husband-and-wife duo bought the business eight years ago in the hope of continuing the place's success, but started losing money rapidly. With a Cuban chef cooking Nordic cuisine and a filthy kitchen, things go from bad to worse until it all comes to a head on relaunch night

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In West Yorkshire, Stacey and Tom kick things off with a traditional European menu, with Stacey forced to confront her fears and handle chicken livers for the first time. Robin and wife Kaz steal the night with terrible jokes and comedy false teeth, while bemused Kiwi couple Leigh and Toni wonder at some of the humour. The second day sees Leigh and Toni preparing their Italian-themed menu in the tiny galley of their barge, but the biggest worry is the rabbit main course. Finally Robin and Kaz host, confident the meaty menu they have in mind will be a winner, along with their planned conga

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a Yorkshire couple who plan to transform a goods wagon into a summerhouse and gin bar, and visits a narrowboat conversion in Buckinghamshire. George's Spanish tour reaches Madrid, where he meets a man who has spent the past 50 years building a cathedral by hand. Plus, work continues on the expandable caravan pod

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A French bulldog called Dave has a spinal deformity, and Noel discovers that not only does he have a genetic malformation of his sacral and lumbar vertebrae, but also excess bone in the pathways where the nerves travel to his legs. Meanwhile, a six-year-old terrier has lost a paw after being attacked by another dog, and the only options appear to be replacing the paw with a bionic implant or amputating the entire limb

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: Siblings Sean and Lorraine from London, and Nick and Nicola, an engaged couple from Newcastle start off with £100,000 and must avoid wrong answers or bundles of their cash will fall through trapdoors. Hosted by Davina McCall

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The elves and fairies recruit Mr Gnome to help them pick blackberries, but he keeps eating them all

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a day out with her family, Peppa is encouraged to find words to describe the different kinds of puddles they find

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A sporty child who uses a wheelchair joins the playgroup, and has lots of fun playing games with Peppa and her friends

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: The children gather at the Go house for band practice, but everything is thrown off key when Mya comes down with a case of the hiccups

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You
programme.desc: Josh is making a Thankful Book and is looking to find out what our friends in the Blue's Clue's house are thankful for.

programme.desc: The Earl and his inventor friend hold a technology fair - which leaves Thomas worried that steam trains will become obsolete

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Chickaletta lays an egg, but it rolls away and heads through town, so the pups have to catch it before it breaks

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Everyone is excited to learn that Mummy Rabbit is pregnant

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig teaches Peppa how to wink, and Zoe comes to visit with her pet monkey

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Pip invents a detective game when Posy is unable to find Froggy

programme.desc: Ryder and the Paw Patrol team stop rabbits tunnelling into Farmer Yumi's garden and eating her carrots

programme.title: Jeremy Vine

programme.title: Build a New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets a Kent couple who plan to convert a derelict 1950s sawmill into a family home and provide their children with a traditional country upbringing. One of the first tasks is to replace the asbestos-lined roof, but the project is then delayed when the pair's £80,000 mortgage application is rejected and they have to lay off their builders

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Our B&B Dream
programme.desc: Lisa Holloway visits a three-bedroom Victorian terrace in Ilford, north-east London. For its owner, retired scientist and museum lover Steven, hosting guests is less about making money and more about the social aspect of B&B. programme.desc: A teenager from a traditional Romani community is looking forward to college, unaware that her family has other plans. When she introduces her new boyfriend to her parents at her 18th birthday party, she is horrified to learn they have arranged a marriage for her, and desperately tries to escape being forced into wedlock. Thriller, starring Ana Golja and Rachel Wilson

programme.desc: TV chef Billie Blessings is dismayed when one of the owners of the popular grocery store she has been buying provisions from since childhood is found dead. The cause of the victim's demise is somewhat unconventional however - crushed by collapsing shelves. Her suspicions roused, Billie and detective Ian Jackson set out on the trail of a possible killer. Mystery drama, starring Holly Robinson Peete and Rick Fox

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Train
programme.desc: The inside story of the trains used by the monarchy for more than 150 years, from its lavish past as the royal express of excess to the present Queen's mobile 'home from home'. The programme meets staff who have served on the train for many years, from the foreman who accidentally walked in on the Queen in her nightgown, to the mischievous 86-year-old signalman who encouraged Diana, Princess of Wales to play practical jokes on his friends

programme.title: World's Most Scenic River Journeys
programme.desc: Documentary series telling the stories of six epic river journeys via the characters who live and work on and around the water. It begins with a trip down the Niagara River, before arriving at the world-famous Niagara Falls. Bill Nighy narrates

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: A look at the little known drama of Winston Churchill's First World War. Aged 40, he became Britain's First Lord of the Admiralty, in charge of the largest naval force in the world. This edition also examines his ability to bounce back from the disaster of Gallipoli, and his experiences on the Western Front

programme.title: Britain's Favourite 80s Songs
programme.desc: A look at the biggest singles of 1984, the best pop videos, the artists who appeared in them, and the stories behind the songs. With contributions from Toyah Willcox, Paul Gambaccini, Carol Decker and Jenny Powell

programme.title: That's So
programme.desc: A look at the year that saw Arthur Scargill and Margaret Thatcher at loggerheads, the Brighton hotel bombing, Torvill and Dean win gold at the Winter Olympics with their famous Bolero routine, the death of comedian Eric Morecambe, and Virgin Atlantic Airways make its inaugural flight. Featuring hits by Band Aid, Black Lace, Cyndi Lauper, Sade and Frankie Goes to Hollywood

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Shock Docs
programme.desc: Documentary exploring some of Britain's most bizarre parent-child relationships, where the mums and dads will do anything to look better than their kids. Those featured include 39-year-old Georgina, who was once a frumpy mum but has now followed daughter Kayla by becoming the image of a Barbie doll, complete with fake boobs and lips. Forty-five-year-old Paul is constantly muscling in on the action with his 18-year-old bodybuilder son Kyle, and former glamour model Charmaine loves flaunting what she has, much to the embarrassment of 14-year-old Yasmin. But when she decides to go back to modelling, how will her daughter react?

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor and presenter visits Durham cathedral, one of Britain's first Unesco World Heritage sites and a leading tourist attraction. The cathedral is over 900 years old and built like a fortress. It is 218ft tall and when first constructed was the country's tallest building. The bishops at Durham were so powerful that they were given the title Prince-Bishop to reflect their huge wealth and influence. As well as exploring the Norman edifice, Tony meets a modern-day treasure hunter who has discovered hidden lost treasures from the cathedral in the River Wear

programme.title: Holidaying with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Jane heads to New York and stays in the heart of Manhattan - Times Square. She has a caricature done in Central Park, enjoys a personal shopping experience, and has a helicopter ride over the city. Joining her to explore is former Olympic athlete Greg Rutherford, along with his wife Susie and two children. They stay in a 5-Star hotel on the shores of Lake Annecy in the French Alps. Plus, Angellica Bell enjoys a staycation weekend in Devon, residing in a quirky beach hut in Babbacombe Bay

programme.title: Fergie & Andrew: The Duke & Duchess of Disaster
programme.desc: Documentary examining the scandals that have surrounded Prince Andrew and Sarah Ferguson since their marriage in 1986 and subsequent divorce. The programme examines the succession of PR gaffes and undercover tabloid stings that followed in the Duchess of York's wake once she was no longer part of the royal family, as well as looking into the prince's friendship with convicted paedophile Jeffrey Epstein

programme.title: Paul Burrell: Royal Service, Scandal & Celebrity
programme.desc: The story of Princess Diana's former butler, charting his rise and the events of 2002, when he stood trial and was cleared of stealing items belonging to the Princess of Wales. Interviews with those who know Burrell best, including his brother and his ghost writer - as well as royal journalists and insiders - reveal how he went from footman to household name

programme.title: Live Boxing

Herring won this title in 2019 when he outpointed Masayuki Ito and has since defended it against Lamont Roach and Jonathan Oquendo. However, Frampton represents arguably his toughest test to date, and the Northern Irishman will be hoping to become a three-weight world champion, having won titles at super bantamweight and featherweight
