Meanwhile, at Tencreek Holiday Park in Looe, a flash flood causes chaos in the kitchen - and the Knowles family from Manchester embark on their annual crabbing competition

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Kamil's businesses turn over £3m a year and he makes over £40,000 profit every month, while his partner Francesca runs a successful lingerie company. They trade places with Derbyshire couple Mel and Sophie and their seven-month-old son Teddy, who live in a three-bedroom rented property in Derbyshire and exist on just £56 a week after bills for all their shopping and travel

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Expats Graham and Linda hope want to open a takeaway in Benalmadena which specialises in selling pies, but their dream has been put on hold until the council grants them permission. Will it all prove to be pie in the sky? Caravan site boss Bambi and her neighbour Johnny, who is also her former dance partner, try to rekindle their old magic at the campsite charity fete. Taffy and Leanne have set up their own pool maintenance business - but it's their own pool that is causing them the biggest headache

programme.title: Britain's Favourite 80s Songs
programme.desc: A look at the biggest singles of 1984, the best pop videos, the artists who appeared in them, and the stories behind the songs. Cheryl Baker reveals how Tina Turner's What's Love Got to Do with It started off as a Bucks Fizz song. Plus, a look at Frankie Goes to Hollywood's controversial Relax, and the hits of Wham!. With contributions from Toyah Willcox, Paul Gambaccini, Carol Decker and Jenny Powell

programme.title: Greatest Ever Celebrity Wind Ups
programme.desc: Joe Pasquale showcases one last selection of pranks, with first-hand accounts from both the celebrity victims and famous tormentors. Justin Timberlake is 'punk'd' into thinking he owes almost a million dollars in back taxes when bailiffs show up at his property to seize everything he owns, and Made in Chelsea's Jamie pranks his friend Sam by turning his car into a ball pit. Simon Cowell stages a hoax audition for Louis Walsh to become a judge on the American version of the X Factor, and footballer Kyle Walker pulls off a spooktacular Halloween prank on his team-mates

programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A 74-year-old with breathing difficulties is rushed into Barnsley Hospital, and registrar Dr Nick Mani considers placing the patient in a medically-induced coma to stabilise him. Junior doctor Ashleigh Trimble assesses 70-year-old Dave, whose daughter Sarah fears her dad's confusion and loss of appetite are masking a more serious condition

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: For years, London's East End was denied a new bridge because of the need to guarantee passage of ships up and down the Thames. For years, the greatest engineers of the age hunted for a design that would keep both road and water traffic moving. As Rob Bell explains, the solution came from architect Horace Jones, whose revolutionary design, with its thousand-tonne opening sections, was powered by nothing more than water. Rob also explains the bridge was lucky to survive the Second World War, having been a target for German V-1 flying bombs

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Nick's Quest
programme.desc: Nick Baker examines the habits of the great white shark, which can grow to 20ft in length. From the safety of an underwater cage, he has an encounter with one of the creatures off the Western Cape of South Africa. He also swims with fur seals and penguins

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton look back on more highlights. They recall a basement flat in Stoke Newington, north London, that was putting off potential buyers because of its dark rooms, out-of-date fixtures and general messiness, and remember a cramped cottage in Quorn, Leicestershire

programme.title: Two by Two (2015)
programme.desc: Two strange creatures and their children are barred from getting on board Noah's Ark, but manage to sneak in. When the kids fall overboard, they face a struggle for survival as the flood waters rise, while their distraught parents must work together to rescue them. Animated adventure, with the voices of Tara Flynn and Dermot Magennis

programme.title: Cutthroat Island (1995)
programme.desc: A tough female pirate enlists the help of an educated slave in finding the three parts of a map leading to buried treasure. However, one of the pieces is in the hands of her cruel uncle, and she also has to find the loot before her crew mutinies or the British Navy catches up with her. Swashbuckling adventure, starring Geena Davis, Matthew Modine, Frank Langella and Maury Chaykin

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: A chain of bizarre and deadly incidents in several countries leads scientists to the conclusion that the Earth's core has stopped spinning. As chaos erupts around the world, experts hatch a plan to halt the destruction and save the human race - but it involves venturing deep below the planet's surface to detonate a nuclear bomb. Sci-fi thriller, starring Aaron Eckhart, Hilary Swank, Stanley Tucci and DJ Qualls

programme.title: Film4 Interview Programmes
programme.desc: Stars and directors talk about the experience of making movies in this compendium of personal and practical reflections

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: Big Game (2014)
programme.desc: The US president's plane is shot down over Finland. The head of state is left stranded in the wilderness being pursued by the terrorists responsible, but finds an unlikely ally in a teenage hunter, whose skills with a bow and arrow prove valuable. Action adventure, starring Samuel L Jackson, Onni Tommila and Ray Stevenson

programme.title: Overlord (2018)
programme.desc: In 1944, a group of American soldiers land in an occupied French hamlet after their plane is destroyed by enemy fire. Their mission is to take out a heavily fortified Nazi radio tower hours before D-Day. However, they stumble across a mysterious Nazi lab where their bloodthirsty enemies are waiting for them. Action thriller from producer JJ Abrams, starring Jovan Adepo, Wyatt Russell and Mathilde Ollivier

programme.title: The Witch (2018)
programme.desc: A young girl escapes from a shadowy facility in the middle of nowhere, and is found bloody and unconscious by an elderly couple. She can't remember a thing, not even her name - who is she and what happened to her? Supernatural action thriller, starring Da-mi Kim. In English and Korean with English subtitles

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul (2017)
programme.desc: Youngster Greg Heffley hatches a plot to re-route a family road trip towards a videogame convention. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Drucker, Alicia Silverstone and Tom Everett Scott

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted (2012)
programme.desc: The escaped zoo animals continue their quest to get back to their New York home. Having made it to Monte Carlo, they join a circus on a European tour as a means of travelling undetected - but an animal control agent is in hot pursuit. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry

programme.title: Mrs Doubtfire (1993)
programme.desc: A struggling actor's ambitious, no-nonsense wife throws him out and demands a divorce. Desperate to spend time with his children, he puts his talents to good use by donning drag and posing as a British housekeeper to get a job looking after them. Comedy, starring Robin Williams, Sally Field, Pierce Brosnan, Harvey Fierstein and Mara Wilson

programme.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard (2017)
programme.desc: A disgraced bodyguard is hired to protect a hitman about to testify against the tyrannical president of Belarus at the International Criminal Court in exchange for the release of his wife from prison. Comedy action thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds, Samuel L Jackson, Gary Oldman and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Return of the Living Dead (1984)
programme.desc: A gang of punks battles flesh-eating undead monsters while trapped in a medical supplies warehouse. Horror comedy, starring Clu Gulager, Beverly Randolph and James Karen

programme.title: Train to Busan (2016)
programme.desc: Hedge-fund manager Seok-woo sets off on a train journey with his small daughter, but as their train is about to leave the station a very sick passenger stumbles aboard - affected by a chemical spill that turns creatures and people into zombies. The virus spreads fast from carriage to carriage, and Seok-woo must join with other unaffected passengers and fight to save his own life and that of his child. South Korean horror, starring Yoo Gong and Yu-mi Jung. In Korean and Hawaiian

programme.title: Flushed Away (2006)
programme.desc: A pampered pet rodent is flushed down a toilet and ends up in a vast underground rat city in the sewers of London. He is befriended by a quick-witted rat who offers to help him find his way home, but first the hapless pair have to escape the clutches of an evil toad bent on ridding the rodent metropolis of its residents. Animated comedy, with the voices of Hugh Jackman, Kate Winslet, Ian McKellen, Shane Richie, Jean Reno and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Shrek Forever After (2010)
programme.desc: The grumpy ogre longs for his simple life as a feared monster, so strikes a deal with magical trickster Rumpelstiltskin to get back to the way things were. However, he soon finds there is a catch - he ends up stuck in an alternate world where none of his friends know who he is and where Rumpelstiltskin has become the kingdom's tyrannical ruler. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz

programme.title: Ferdinand (2017)
programme.desc: After a bull with a big heart is mistaken for a dangerous beast, he is captured and torn from his home. Determined to return to his family, he rallies a misfit team on the ultimate adventure. Animated comedy, with the voices of John Cena, Kate McKinnon and Bobby Cannavale

programme.title: Evolution (2001)
programme.desc: Two science teachers investigate a mysterious meteor and discover it is oozing a strange fluid containing millions of minuscule but rapidly evolving organisms - which start to turn into terrifying alien monsters with a taste for human flesh. Sci-fi comedy, starring David Duchovny, Orlando Jones, Julianne Moore, Seann William Scott, Dan Aykroyd and Ted Levine

programme.title: We Bought a Zoo (2011)
programme.desc: A father-of-two struggling to cope with the death of his wife is in need of a fresh start, so buys a house with a dilapidated zoo on the grounds. With the help of the keepers, he works to restore the attraction to its former glory, while also trying to reconnect with his troubled teenage son. Fact-based comedy drama, starring Matt Damon, Scarlett Johansson and Thomas Haden Church

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle (2017)
programme.desc: Having saved the world once, secret agents Eggsy and Merlin join forces with their US counterparts to bring down a psychotic femme fatale. Thankfully they are assisted by a veteran hero brought back from the dead, and cross paths with a kidnapped Elton John and a couple of killer robot dogs along the way. Director Matthew Vaughn's comedy adventure sequel, starring Taron Egerton, Colin Firth, Mark Strong and Julianne Moore

programme.title: The Man Who Killed Hitler and Then the Bigfoot (2018)
programme.desc: An American war veteran who infiltrated the Nazi ranks as a young man and shot Hitler dead is considered by the FBI to be the ideal man to track and kill the Bigfoot - who is carrying a disease lethal to humans. Fantasy adventure, starring Sam Elliott and Aidan Turner

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot (1974)
programme.desc: Retired bank robber John Doherty escapes a gunman with the aid of a young car thief, and together they go in search of the loot from the former crook's last job. When they discover the stash is missing - and John's thuggish old partners are also looking for it - the pair decide to do a repeat robbery. Comedy drama, starring Clint Eastwood, Jeff Bridges, George Kennedy and Geoffrey Lewis

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to reverse the fortunes of the Mixing Bowl diner in Bellmore, New York, where a talented cook's work is being undone by the manager's marketing plans - putting the finances in dire straits

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is selected to take the lead at work on a campaign focusing on the conversations black parents have had with their children down the years to prepare them for the racial bias they may face in the world. Rainbow finds a group of women online whom she can lean on for advice and support

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre and Rainbow's morning routine with the children changes radically after Rainbow decides to take time off work. Andre Jr bonds with Diane now that he has to drive his younger siblings to and from school

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker arranges for Danny to take part as a guest on Mary Hart's show, but his TV appearance takes a turn when he becomes emotional during the interview. Meanwhile, Ben and Riley have a misunderstanding about Angela. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: When Riley's company is hired to represent a preacher whose life has been hit by scandal, she is charged with making sure the man's wilful daughter stays out of trouble. Meanwhile, Bonnie's new career in real estate soon hits problems. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard stake their most coveted comic books on a bet over the species of a cricket, while Leonard and Penny struggle to recover from an awkward first night together. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon succeeds in getting Penny to conform to his high standards, so Leonard adopts a similar strategy for his romantic gain. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj meet two women at a goth nightclub and things appear to go well - until they are taken to a tattoo parlour

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry makes fun of Adam for taking part in a school musical production, but when he finds out that Adam and Lainey have been cast in roles that require them to kiss, he tries to sabotage it by joining the stage crew. Meanwhile, substitute teacher Beverly causes chaos in Erica's class. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam creates a video that makes it look as though he and his friends beat Barry in a game of basketball, Barry demands a rematch in the school gym. Beverly tries to throw a 'surprise' party for Murray's 50th birthday, despite his objections to the idea

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad has time to kill when the arrival of the Serbian president's motorcade to Brooklyn is delayed, so Peralta launches the seventh annual Jimmy Jab Games, an eccentric series of races and contests held in the precinct building. Meanwhile, Jeffords and Holt must set up a new drug task force approved by Holt's nemesis, Madeline Wuntch

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon refuses to get his hair cut as his regular barber is in a coma - a solitary change that causes chaos in the rest of his well-ordered life. Meanwhile, Howard undergoes a gruelling Nasa training programme in Houston, Texas, meaning he can only communicate with Bernadette via the internet

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is disappointed with Sheldon when he announces he is breaking his promise to go with her to a birthday party in favour of joining the boys for a Star Wars video-game marathon. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny catches the eye of comic-book shopkeeper Stuart, and Leonard is devastated when she gives serious consideration to dating her new admirer. Desperate for help, Leonard enlists Sheldon to discredit his love rival by preying on his obsession with Batman. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Kevin Sussman star

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry plans big romantic gestures for Lainey on high school prom night, while Erica and Geoff try to attend the event together, but things don't go as planned. Adam is thrilled when a nerdy but cute girl asks him out, but is horrified when Beverly gets involved

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry attempts to drive a wedge between Adam and Pops when they debate the merits of a recently released Batman movie. Erica deliberately makes a mess of her interview at one university so that she will only receive an offer from her first choice of college, but her plan goes badly awry. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey, Sean Giambrone and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta faces paying back all the money he has borrowed from his colleagues over the years, and goes to great lengths to keep a secret about Sergeant Jeffords. Santiago and Captain Holt team up to reopen the Brooklyn Broiler arson case

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta, he tries to win the favour of her boss Geoffrey (guest star Chris Parnell). Meanwhile, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples have one on one meetings with their partners' closest friends and family, while a night out leads to a fracture between the husbands

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard returns from his space mission, but the welcome from his friends and family does not meet his expectations. His night alone with Bernadette goes badly, his mother ignores him, and he realises Stuart has taken his place as Raj's best friend. On top of that, Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny kick him out of their group games night. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart hosts a Halloween party at the comic-book store, and Howard talks incessantly about his work on board the International Space Station, annoying his wife and friends. Penny and Leonard have a steamy encounter at the lab. Guest starring real-life astronaut Buzz Aldrin

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Joao must deal with the consequences of his alcohol-fuelled alter ego, Jezabob, Brooke is torn between being single and jumping back into the dating pool

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard meets up with the woman he kissed during his trip in the hope of setting Penny's mind at ease, while Sheldon films a special episode of Fun with Flags after his break-up with Amy. Bernadette feels guilty about keeping a secret from Penny

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014)
programme.desc: In a future ravaged by war, the superhero team makes a desperate last stand against a force of deadly robots. Their only hope is to send Wolverine back in time to the 1970s, to join forces with an earlier version of the X-Men and change the events that started the conflict. Superhero adventure sequel uniting the casts of the original movie and prequel First Class, starring Hugh Jackman, Jennifer Lawrence, James McAvoy and Michael Fassbender

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Penny use Bernadette to spy on Leonard and Priya after the couple invite her and Howard to dinner. An experimental drug helps Raj overcome his fear of talking to women, but proves more effective than he had expected. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard decides to tell his mother that he and Bernadette are engaged - but she later collapses, making him fear the shock of the news has caused her to suffer a heart attack. As the gang convenes at the hospital, Sheldon's fear of infectious diseases lands him in trouble, while Priya and Penny bond over coffee

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts a fresh run of the dating show. Student Charles is a self-confessed 'idiot' who says his love life is a disaster, so he hopes to find a partner by going naked. Lee, also a student, identifies as non-binary and pansexual and is open to dating all genders. She hopes to find someone who will accept her for who she is

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Capturing the households' instant reactions to what they are watching on TV, including The Big Audition, Strictly Come Dancing, Killing Eve, The Great British Bake Off, Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild, Magic Numbers: Hannah Fry's Mysterious World of Maths, and Gordon, Gino and Fred: Road Trip. First aired in October 2018

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Nish Kumar pretends he is Robin Hood and Aisling Bea bleeds on bread, while Mark Watson feels the wrath of yoghurt

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: British people may be famous for a stiff upper lip, but divorcees Shirlie and Dave get up close and personal. It's clear these fiftysomethings are feeling frisky. Richard and Freya bond over a shared love of musical theatre, and 33-year-old mother-of-two and yoga teacher Abi says she is looking for no less than James Bond. Will nice guy Mark leave her shaken or stirred?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon succeeds in getting Penny to conform to his high standards, so Leonard adopts a similar strategy for his romantic gain. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj meet two women at a goth nightclub and things appear to go well - until they are taken to a tattoo parlour

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is selected to take the lead at work on a campaign focusing on the conversations black parents have had with their children down the years to prepare them for the racial bias they may face in the world. Rainbow finds a group of women online whom she can lean on for advice and support

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre and Rainbow's morning routine with the children changes radically after Rainbow decides to take time off work. Andre Jr bonds with Diane now that he has to drive his younger siblings to and from school

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring ducks going up an escalator, animal impressions, narrow escapes on a snowboard and an energy drink house prank

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Parents David and Nina Bean are struggling to balance their complicated work schedules and four kids, so Jo Frost comes to the assistance of the Chicago-based family

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: The reality show returns as the socialites escape Chelsea and bubble together in a Cotswolds mansion, where Ollie and Gareth have an exciting announcement to make

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bob's in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters aren't improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before it's too late

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Cafe Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales

programme.title: A Dog's Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's ingenious idea for a new smartphone app puts pressure on his friendship with Sheldon, who vies with him for control of the project. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tension mounts when the pals attend a weekend science conference. Howard becomes argumentative after Bernadette runs into a former boyfriend, and the fallout causes chaos with the hotel room arrangements. Rick Fox guest stars, with Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon agrees to participate in a series of short lectures at the university, but is worried the students dislike him. Following Amy's advice, he asks Penny to give him acting lessons to help him engage with his audience. Elsewhere, Raj fantasises about his best friend's partner. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is forced to consider how far he is willing to push himself in the name of science when a wealthy benefactor makes an indecent proposal. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, with Jessica Walter (Arrested Development) and Joshua Malina (The West Wing)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is torn between his relationship with Bernadette and pleasing his mother - and comes up with a solution that leaves everyone unsatisfied. Leonard rekindles his romance with Raj's sister Priya, while Amy uses Penny's emotions as the basis for a research project

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to make a new set of friends as he is depressed that the group's social world revolves around Leonard rather than himself. Meanwhile, Amy and Bernadette try to persuade Penny to go on a date. Comedy, guest starring LeVar Burton, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard faces the difficult decision of choosing between his relationship with Priya and his friendship with Penny, while Sheldon is irritated by one of Howard's magic tricks. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is distraught when his online gaming account is hacked, so his friends decide to find out who is responsible. However, they make the disastrous mistake of confronting the culprit in person. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard meets up with the woman he kissed during his trip in the hope of setting Penny's mind at ease, while Sheldon films a special episode of Fun with Flags after his break-up with Amy. Bernadette feels guilty about keeping a secret from Penny

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas hosts as TV presenter Stacey Dooley, Little Mix's Jade Thirlwall, comedian Katherine Ryan and internet influencer KSI show off their baking skills. They serve up cocktail-flavoured fondant fancies, have their knowledge of pastry tested in the technical and in the showstopper are asked to create a scene showing something they cannot live without - all from biscuit and meringue. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: The war between the shape-shifting robots erupts once again, as the first of the evil Decepticons leads an attack on Earth to locate an ancient planet-destroying machine. Hapless teenager Sam Witwicky is caught in the middle of the ensuing conflict as he holds the key to discovering the location of the device. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Famous faces inlcuding Shaun Ryder and Bez, Rylan Clark-Neal and his mother Linda, Denise Van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, and Oti Mabuse and her sisters Motsi and Phemelo give their opinions on This Morning, Killing Eve, Extreme Tribe: The Last Pygmies, Taken, The Chase, 8 Days: To the Moon and Back, and Serengeti

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics share more of their insightful critiques of the week's biggest and best shows, including The Crown, I'm a Celebrity… Get Me Out of Here!, Not the Robbie Williams Christmas Show, The X Factor: The Band, Made in Chelsea: Buenos Aires, and The Apprentice. First shown in December 2019

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: TV's most vocal armchair critics give their thoughts on programmes from February 2020, including The Stranger, Love Is Blind, EastEnders, Crazy Delicious, Spy in the Wild, Hunted, and ITV News reports on Harry and Meghan, and brain surgery

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Transsexual Charlie hopes to use his Irish charm to win the affections of 22-year-old Charlotte, who claims to have no gender boundaries. How will she feel when he tells her his secret? Retired market trader Billy (82) has his work cut out trying to tame divorced aromatherapist Sandra, and 20-year-old Rhys struggles to get a word in when he sits down for a date with chatty nanny Georgia

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More singletons meet up over a meal at the First Dates restaurant. Eccentric theology student Louisa is looking for someone to love her as she is. Will supermarket worker Will be the one for her? Legal secretary Anna is matched with male stripper Junior - although she has a different type of dance in mind - Italian locksmith Roberto meets Croation nanny Aleksandra, and Cameron and Louise look like the perfect match - but they've both been hurt in love and have their defences up

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Famous faces inlcuding Shaun Ryder and Bez, Rylan Clark-Neal and his mother Linda, Denise Van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, and Oti Mabuse and her sisters Motsi and Phemelo give their opinions on This Morning, Killing Eve, Extreme Tribe: The Last Pygmies, Taken, The Chase, 8 Days: To the Moon and Back, and Serengeti

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics share more of their insightful critiques of the week's biggest and best shows, including The Crown, I'm a Celebrity… Get Me Out of Here!, Not the Robbie Williams Christmas Show, The X Factor: The Band, Made in Chelsea: Buenos Aires, and The Apprentice. First shown in December 2019

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Yorkshire groom Lee is tasked with planning a surprise wedding for bride-to-be Rebecca, but instead, goes on a week-long trip around Europe with his brother Lee and his friends

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan loves music as well as his home town of Stoke-on-Trent. So, when bride-to-be Beccie gives him free rein to plan their wedding, he decides to honour them - and not her - with nuptials based on the rare grooves of Northern Soul. Will this groom be able to deliver a swinging day, or will his bride be swinging wildly at him?

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. Their relationship is so fractured that they're failing to save their father's Italian restaurant Levanti's from being overwhelmed by local competition, and the situation has become so desperate that their dad is in danger of losing his life savings

programme.title: The Book of Life (2014)
programme.desc: A man who longs to be a musician instead of a bullfighter like his father has to compete with a childhood friend when they fall for the same woman. Their love triangle catches the eye of the spirits of the dead, leading him on a journey through their bizarre world. Animated adventure, with the voices of Diego Luna, Zoe Saldana and Channing Tatum

programme.title: Quentin Blake's Clown
programme.desc: Animation, based on the book by Quentin Blake, bringing to life the adventures of a little toy clown, thrown away with a load of old discarded items, as he goes on a journey to find a new loving home for himself and his friends. His journey takes him through the helter-skelter streets of the city, dodging scary dogs and even scarier adults. He even finds himself mistaken for a child and performs in a school Christmas assembly. However, each time Clown thinks he might just have found a perfect new owner, and his hopes start to rise, he gets thrown away again

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Sheldon start a gossip experiment to see how quickly rumours spread among the gang, while Howard tells his friends he is planning to propose to Bernadette - not realising Raj is wrestling with his own feelings for her. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is infuriated when Priya uses her legal knowledge to find a loophole in the room-mate agreement - but his spirits are lifted by a night on the town with Amy, Penny and Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Penny use Bernadette to spy on Leonard and Priya after the couple invite her and Howard to dinner. An experimental drug helps Raj overcome his fear of talking to women, but proves more effective than he had expected. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard decides to tell his mother that he and Bernadette are engaged - but she later collapses, making him fear the shock of the news has caused her to suffer a heart attack. As the gang convenes at the hospital, Sheldon's fear of infectious diseases lands him in trouble, while Priya and Penny bond over coffee

programme.title: The Tiger Who Came to Tea
programme.desc: Hand-drawn animated version of Judith Kerr's much-loved tale, which celebrated its 50th anniversary in 2018. A tea-guzzling tiger turns up unannounced and eats and drinks young Sophie and her mummy out of everything in the house, even draining the water from their taps. Narrated by David Walliams, with David Oyelowo providing the voice for the big cat alongside seven-year-old Clara Ross as Sophie, with other characters played by Benedict Cumberbatch, Tamsin Greig and Paul Whitehouse

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potter's stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Teen First Dates
programme.desc: Trainee accountant and self-confessed nerd Richard is dressed to impress on his first-ever date, but art student Charlotte is less than blown away

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley

programme.title: X-Men: Apocalypse (2016)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes face the oldest and most powerful of their kind, an ancient Egyptian tyrant who is restored to life in the 1980s and plans to destroy civilisation and rebuild it in his own image. Superhero adventure sequel, starring James McAvoy, Michael Fassbender, Jennifer Lawrence and Oscar Isaac

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Contestants Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack, Mike Wozniak and Sarah Kendall vie once more, as Taskmaster Greg Davies presides. On this edition, Lee attempts an audacious hammer throw, Sarah makes sitting down memorable and Jamali forgets his passport. As usual, Alex Horne offers the intrepid contenders moral support

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of shows aired in October 2018. Programmes under consideration include This Morning at the Royal Wedding of Princess Eugenie, The Great Model Railway Challenge, The Last Leg, Strictly Come Dancing, Killing Eve and Horizon - Avalanche: Making a Deadly Snowstorm

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: In an edition first shown in November 2018, the sofa critics review The Heist, Strictly Come Dancing, Dynasties, They Shall Not Grow Old, Extreme Everest with Ant Middleton, First Dates, and What Lies Beneath

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette receives her PhD, and the friends then tease Howard about being the only one among them who is not a doctor. Meanwhile, Raj becomes Sheldon's new flatmate after overhearing Leonard and Priya engaging in a Star Trek bedroom fantasy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny worries about the consequences of spending the night with Raj, and Leonard's reaction confirms her worst fears. Meanwhile, Sheldon is more interested in the upcoming paintball competition, and tries to refocus the boys' attentions as they argue over the previous evening's activities. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. It's the grand opening of Trish's dance school at Hollyoaks High, and its success becomes more important than ever when one of her dance rivals turns up

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp enters the single-cake class at the Devon County Show, and hopes to win over the judges with her own Caribbean-inspired recipe. However, it is a fellow competitor's beetroot cake that ends up raising their eyebrows

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Mel and Steve want to buy a holiday home in south Queensland, Australia that will become their permanent home once they retire. The property also has to suit their daughter Vikki, who has relocated to Oz and plans to move in. It's a big challenge for Ben Hillman as he sets out to find a property that gives Mel, Steve and Vikki everything they want from their wish-list, on their budget of £220,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a Yorkshire textile mill, where Simon repurposes a mill trolley into a coffee table and Henry struggles to repair a Soviet-era motorbike

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole head to Surrey and Hampshire. Simon builds a huge kitchen table from discarded rafters and gives a 1970s campervan a new lease of life. Henry hankers after an American tractor and Royal Enfield motorbike and sidecar

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers try to track down the relatives of a man whose family was involved in the textile trade, and there is a look at the story of Jewish artist Jehuda Epstein, whose paintings were among thousands of artworks plundered by the Nazis during the Second World War

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: In Caterham in Surrey, Charlie Luxton meets Ben and Nicola, who have spotted the huge potential of a dilapidated bungalow, which they plan to reimagine as a contemporary split-level home. The project is a bit hectic though. Can Charlie instil some stability and make sure Ben and Nicola don't become overwhelmed?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at Just B in Edinburgh, owned by Karen MacDonald and Geoff Thomson, who hope that their slice of Zen will impress their guests. Nick and Stefan are forced to comply with the house rules in some alternative attire, while Tony and Natalie make some dirty discoveries in their dog-friendly room. At dinner, the hosts serve up their spiritual side, and the competition hots up as Stefan reveals his hospitality pedigree. In the morning, a mushroom misdemeanour leaves a bad taste in Tony's mouth

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Glencoe Villa Guesthouse in Featherstone, West Yorkshire, owned by Ewa Hunt, who is joined by her best friend, Ellie. The homely styled bedrooms aren't to everyone's taste, and at dinner there's a debate about how to host. At breakfast, some guests pick holes in the pre-order system, and in the kitchen Ewa's under pressure

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Fox Inn in Stourton, Staffordshire, owned by uncle and nephew Stefan Carron and Nick Edwards. Most of their guests are bowled over by the bedrooms, but Tony isn't wild about the decor. At dinner, Stefan impresses with some serious celebrity name dropping and Tony reveals his alternative approach to taking on staff. At breakfast, pro chef Nick pulls out all the stops with his presentation, but missing items mean feedback falls short from Tony

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The New Inn in Newton, Derbyshire, owned by Tony Carlin, who's joined by his partner Natalie Briggs. On first impressions the guests feel it's lacking luxury, and Ewa and Ellie have cleanliness concerns. At dinner, the luxury label is called into question, and a bust up over the self-service breakfast is narrowly avoided. At breakfast time, the hosts do a disappearing act, which doesn't go down well with their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Just B is first, and owners Karen and Geoff get some answers while hearing the truth from guests on their hair-raising stay

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to the Chiltern Hills in Buckinghamshire to meet Adam and Mandy, who run a classic car restoration business. Henry uncovers an anvil, while Simon finds an old brown dresser, which he thinks could become a wildlife sanctuary for birds and insects

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester's Penguin Island is home to one of the most enduring love stories in the zoo. At 22, Rud is the oldest on the island, and has been with his partner, Spike, for over 15 years. However, keepers are concerned that Rud's arthritic hip could be affecting his quality of life. Meanwhile, the Sumatran tigers are upgrading to a luxury new enclosure on the other side of the zoo as part of Chester's huge expansion. But they've lived in their home for most of their lives so it's not going to be an easy move

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Angel Adoree advises Jonathan and Michael on how to make their chateau wedding business work. Then it's crunch time for the pair as they try to persuade an American couple to book a big-money wedding with them. Meanwhile, Phil and Angelina clear their garden for a wedding anniversary party, but struggle to dispose of the debris. Elsewhere, Johnny and Ashley view two properties as they search for a dream chateau

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of self-made property developer Barry Surtees and his wife Julie as they try to build a four-storey mansion in Brighton, complete with pool, gym, artist's studio, fantasy bedroom and Japanese roof garden. The project is not without its difficulties as the cost of materials escalates, neighbours become unhappy about the house dwarfing the rest of the street, and Barry undergoes triple heart-bypass surgery

programme.title: Deutschland 89
programme.desc: Martin and Nicole head after Lenora who is seeking refuge with Grigore in Romania, the last stronghold the communists retain. Schweppenstette uses HVA tactics to win over a dogmatic State Bank employee, while Fritz's enterprise takes a surprising turn. Drama, starring Jonas Nay. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: In an edition of the documentary focusing on fathers and sons, 51-year-old builder Rod is rushed into A&E after falling 18 feet from scaffolding onto concrete. When scans reveal that he has fractured some of his vertebrae and will require extensive surgery, his wife Nicky is left to call their two sons to prepare them for bad news. Meanwhile, 86-year-old retired policeman John is brought to St George's with a head injury after falling off a wall. As doctors assess the severity of the damage, he talks about how his career took over his life, so much so that he missed the birth of his son. Plus, 19-year-old cyclist Mack requires specialist help for a dislocated shoulder, after he collided with a Porsche. His dad explains how adopting him and his brother changed all of their lives

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Three-year-old Louie is airlifted to St George's after being run over by a car while playing outside, with doctors expressing concern about his neck, which seems to be stuck in one position. Elsewhere, 14-year-old Josh is treated after injuring his ankle when riding a BMX with his father on the front. Meanwhile, 41-year-old Sam arrives in resus with a cut to her head and possible spinal and internal injuries after losing control of her car and crashing into a tree

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Jon Richardson and James Acaster teaming up against Lee Mack and Sarah Millican. John Cooper Clarke is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: In an edition of the documentary focusing on fathers and sons, 51-year-old builder Rod is rushed into A&E after falling 18 feet from scaffolding onto concrete. When scans reveal that he has fractured some of his vertebrae and will require extensive surgery, his wife Nicky is left to call their two sons to prepare them for bad news. Meanwhile, 86-year-old retired policeman John is brought to St George's with a head injury after falling off a wall. As doctors assess the severity of the damage, he talks about how his career took over his life, so much so that he missed the birth of his son. Plus, 19-year-old cyclist Mack requires specialist help for a dislocated shoulder, after he collided with a Porsche. His dad explains how adopting him and his brother changed all of their lives

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Three-year-old Louie is airlifted to St George's after being run over by a car while playing outside, with doctors expressing concern about his neck, which seems to be stuck in one position. Elsewhere, 14-year-old Josh is treated after injuring his ankle when riding a BMX with his father on the front. Meanwhile, 41-year-old Sam arrives in resus with a cut to her head and possible spinal and internal injuries after losing control of her car and crashing into a tree

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt heads to Italy to find out how supermarkets can sell pesto at an affordable price when the traditional ingredients are expensive, while Jimmy Doherty investigates why so many cockles in UK supermarkets come from abroad when he always thought of them as a quintessentially British staple. Kate Quilton takes a trip around Europe's largest marshmallow factory to find out why the sticky treat goes crispy and melty at the same time over the campfire

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas comes to the aid of Neil Masey and Affy Wajid, a Brighton-based couple seeking to pick up a holiday home on Ibiza. The pair hope that setting up house will allow them to enjoy the island's party lifestyle, while also having a place where they can entertain friends and begin their explorations of the Mediterranean landscape

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Laura Hamilton helps Rodney and Lynda Palliser from Hertfordshire search for their dream holiday home near the upmarket, cosmopolitan city of Palma - the capital of Majorca - on a budget of £100,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Ruth Jobey wants to escape from her busy London life to the relaxed town of Oliva on Spain's Costa del Azahar, or 'orange blossom coast'. She wants a detached villa with a swimming pool and views, so Ben Hillman shows her some properties for her £150,000 budget that meet that criteria

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Catching up with two couples, Cherelle and Leon, and teachers Richard and Jo, who were both looking for new homes in 2017. In Croydon, Phil Spencer helped local couple Cherelle and Leon, who were rapidly being priced out the area. Meanwhile in Reading, teachers Richard and Jo sought Phil's aid as they searched for a new home for them and their two daughters, and had only six weeks to find one. Now, Phil returns to catch up with the couples and find out what happened next

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Zumba teacher Amanda hosts the first dinner party in Weston-super-Mare, where she hopes to impress her guests Harry, drama teacher Nancy, businesswoman Tracy and estate manager Chris with a locally sourced Somerset menu. Although the evening starts off with some friendly banter, it soon turns sour for some of the contestants

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rugby fan and sports centre manager Harry hosts the second night in Weston-super-Mare, where he hopes to wow his guests with a traditional Hungarian menu, complete with beef in hunter's sauce and bird's milk with meringue dumplings

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Weston-super-Mare, drama teacher and music lover Nancy throws an Austrian-themed party to reflect her love of the country and its music, with a menu featuring wiener schnitzel and venison stew. The starter proves to be a hit with the guests, but her main course fails to impress, and the atmosphere grows tense when Chris compares her dessert to the worst food experience of his life

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farm-estate manager Chris hosts the fourth party in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset, and hopes his African-based menu can impress his guests. He serves savoury doughnuts, which are a new experience for his fellow diners. However, his main course of deep fried beef doesn't go down as well, leaving his chances of winning the competition resting on the evening's entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businesswoman Tracy hosts the final dinner party in Weston-super-Mare, and her dance-inspired evening includes lessons in cha-cha and tango as well as a black-tie dress code. Her guests tuck into a main course of steak cooked to each person's taste, which proves difficult to co-ordinate

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: A look back at the transformation of Dick Strawbridge and his wife Angel's 45-room chateau from an abandoned ruin into a sumptuous family home. This episode looks back at how the abandoned walled garden stole Dick and Angel's hearts and how the family members fell for the country lifestyle, with their children growing up learning about seasons, livestock and wildlife

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree enter their fifth year of living in France. With more weddings and events booked in than ever, the couple prepare for their busiest year yet. In order to feed a total of 1,500 guests, Dick and Angel begin renovating the back of the basement, creating a brand new, state-of-the-art events kitchen. Engineer Dick faces a complicated plumbing issue and there's a kitchen design challenge for Angel

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien restore eight items, including a pine blanket chest, a pair of battlefield telephones and some gothic church windows

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Documentary following the Countryfile presenter as he and his family come to the rescue his parents' farm in the Durham hills after his mother suffers an accident

programme.title: Walking with Elephants
programme.desc: Levison Wood continues his epic 650-mile journey on foot, following the annual migration of Botswana's 130,000 elephants, and faces his toughest challenge yet. Together with his guide Kane, Lev treks along the route taken by the male elephants through the immense salt pans of the Makgadikgadi, via the frontier town of Gweta, to the edge of the Okavango Delta. Along the way, he narrowly escapes being surrounded by nervous bull elephants, before enjoying the incredible experience of being up close to the same group as they drink at a waterhole

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Seventy-nine-year-old Carole is brought in with signs of a stroke, and neurologist Dr Mahinda opts for a treatment that only has a slim chance of success. A 77-year-old man with diabetes has an infection in his toes, and doctors consider amputating his foot to stop it spreading. A woman's false eyelashes leave her with abrasions to her eyes

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-two-year-old retired firefighter John is airlifted to A&E after being accidentally hit in the face with a golf club, which hit him so hard that it snapped. With a suspected critical head injury, he is sent for a CT scan, and doctors are concerned that his right eye is not reacting as it should and he is weak down the right-hand side of his body. Meanwhile, 77-year-old Joan arrives in St George's after falling down the stairs at home and hurting her leg. As she waits to be treated, she talks about growing up in Camberwell

programme.title: Britain's Best Loved Sitcoms
programme.desc: Part one of two. Tamsin Greig narrates this countdown of the shows that have made millions laugh over the past 50 years. From recent series like The Office, Twenty Twelve, Mrs Brown's Boys and Peep Show, to old classics such as The Likely Lads, Dad's Army and Steptoe and Son, which one will come out on top in a UK poll? The programme features interviews with genre favourites, including Brendan O'Carroll, Richard Wilson, Tony Robinson, Ricky Tomlinson and Wendy Craig

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: A sense of dread descends on Craggy Island as the priests prepare for poker-faced Father Stone's annual visit - and Ted tries desperately to think of a scheme to get rid of him. Clerical comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Bishop Brennan orders Ted and Dougal to campaign against a controversial film - but as a result of their protest it becomes the biggest box-office hit in Craggy Island's history. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon, Frank Kelly and Pauline McLynn

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Seventy-nine-year-old Carole is brought in with signs of a stroke, and neurologist Dr Mahinda opts for a treatment that only has a slim chance of success. A 77-year-old man with diabetes has an infection in his toes, and doctors consider amputating his foot to stop it spreading. A woman's false eyelashes leave her with abrasions to her eyes

programme.title: Britain's Best Loved Sitcoms
programme.desc: Part one of two. Tamsin Greig narrates this countdown of the shows that have made millions laugh over the past 50 years. From recent series like The Office, Twenty Twelve, Mrs Brown's Boys and Peep Show, to old classics such as The Likely Lads, Dad's Army and Steptoe and Son, which one will come out on top in a UK poll? The programme features interviews with genre favourites, including Brendan O'Carroll, Richard Wilson, Tony Robinson, Ricky Tomlinson and Wendy Craig

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The first episode of the hit comedy. The Craggy Island cleric dreams of achieving stardom on the Faith of Our Fathers TV show - but his hopes are dashed by Jack and Dougal's untimely intervention. Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Frank Kelly star

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George meets a couple with a steadily expanding brood that has rapidly outgrown their narrowboat home. The pair are reluctant to give up their river-based lifestyle, and are on the market for a much wider Dutch barge. However, following through with their plan would mean sacrificing room height, leading to the development of a radical solution. He also visits a family planning to transform a dilapidated swimming pool into a sunken garden room, and heads to a Second World War decontamination bunker that has found a new lease of life as a luxury dwelling. Plus, the presenter's German road trip continues as he take in a futuristic lakeside house with sliding doors that provide an impressive view

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George visits Lucas and Hayley, whose bland and boxy 1970s four-bedroom home sticks out like a sore thumb among the period properties of Saffron Walden, Essex. To make matters worse, some 1980s interior additions have added insult to injury - and the double garage at the side is next to useless. Enter architect Chris Dyson to bring the property bang up to date. But will Lucas and Hayley be happy with his radical plans?

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke helps unlock the potential of two houses in south London. He begins by helping NHS theatre nurse Hannah, whose Edwardian workers' cottage in Thornton Heath is so small she has had to give the only decent bedroom to her two children while she sleeps in the front room. Can he provide the luxurious master bedroom she needs? George also helps a couple renovate their Streatham home, which would not be so bad if not for the previous owners' love of glass chandeliers, Roman columns and marble-effect tiles

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Council manager Charlotte hosts the first dinner party in Llanelli, Carmarthenshire, where she hopes to impress electrician Steve, occupational nurse Christine, retired French teacher Meic, and teaching assistant Ainsley with an evening that features a former rugby choir as entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Electrician Steve hosts the second night of the competition in Llanelli, Carmarthenshire, and hopes that his menu of lasagne, vegetable soup and homemade wine will impress his guests and win him the £1,000 prize. As the evening goes on, Meic decides to bare all with a revelation that shocks Christine

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Occupational nurse Christine hosts the third dinner party in Llanelli, where she tries to impress her guests with a menu of family favourites and a performance by her number one rock band. Charlotte and Meic stumble across the host's messy office, and trouble brews when Ainsley tells Christine that she looks like one of her exes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired French teacher Meic hosts the fourth night of the competition in Llanelli, Carmarthenshire, and plans an authentic French menu including poulet Basquaise. Fellow diner Charlotte makes an impression when she arrives wearing an onion necklace, and the host hopes that his specially branded cremes brulees will impress his guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final day of the competition in Llanelli, and the turn of teaching assistant Ainsley to host. She wants to educate her guests, while serving an authentic Russian-themed dinner party. However, vodka-infused pavlova and some dancing may not be enough to offset the cantankerous mood at the dinner table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another quartet of B&B owners battle it out to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money, beginning with Paul Billington and Flora Loizou from Silverwood Lodge in Cambridgeshire. The couple get a frosty response when one guest learns her hosts do not live on-site, while another is left in hysterics by an unexpected discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The group sets off for Great Yarmouth to stay in Sue Dodd's dog-friendly Seashells Guesthouse. Spirits run high with a trip to the beach and a game of bingo, but Nancy's complaints over dog hairs on the sheets and smoking in the rooms bring down the light-hearted mood during dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: American ex-banker Nancy Hampson hosts at the Old Court Guesthouse in Bath, but her vocal criticisms of the week's first two establishments have made her no friends among her fellow competitors. Paul Billington is annoyed that the bed he and wife Flora Loizou are given is not big enough, but is more impressed when taken for food at a quirky local restaurant

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests stay with Caroline Scott, the owner of the Dean B&B near Longniddry, East Lothian The picturesque house and breathtaking views across the Firth of Forth win everyone over, but underwear in the drawers, cobwebs on the curtains and a messy breakfast service seriously hamper the host's chances of success

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Sue from Seashells in Great Yarmouth confronts Nancy Hampson about the controversial topic of smoking in bedrooms, while Paul Billington and Flora Loizou are held to account about their low mark for the Old Court Guesthouse

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four amateur chefs compete for the £1,000 prize in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, with straight-talking Jackie Critten first to host in the culinary contest

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Self-assured Phil Cowper hosts the next dinner party in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, as he attempts to impress guests Shanelle Cutsforth, Chris Wood and Jackie Critten

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Shanelle Cutsforth hosts the third dinner party in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, as she attempts to gain high marks from guests Phil Cowper, Chris Wood and Jackie Critten

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chris Wood hosts the final dinner party in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, before he and guests Phil Cowper, Shanelle Cutsforth and Jackie Critten discover who has won the £1,000

programme.title: A Taste of Italy
programme.desc: Nisha Katona samples a range of dishes in Viterbo, a hilltop city with a papal history in Lazio. She tastes freshwater lake fish from the largest volcanic crater lake in Europe and tries acquacotta viterbese - a traditional soup of local vegetables, herbs and a poached egg. The chef and restaurateur also visits a salami emporium where she savours susianella di Viterbo - a local delicacy of liver and offal sausage - and inspired by her discoveries, cooks poached fish and vegetables with hazelnut butter

programme.title: Inside Cadbury: Chocolate Secrets Unwrapped
programme.desc: Documentary examining the world of one of Britain's biggest and best-loved chocolate makers. Behind closed doors at Cadbury's Bournville plant, a team of scientists struggles to meet the biggest challenge the company has faced for a century - to dramatically cut sugar from its Dairy Milk recipe. Can the new bar match up to its beloved predecessor? Elsewhere in the factory, new flavours of chocolate are put into production, with wacky recipes invented by lucky members of the public

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: paramedics race against the clock as a man shows signs of a stroke, and a drunk man is stranded in the street and has to be taken to hospital for his own safety

programme.title: Surviving a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In December 2006, the bodies of five sex workers were discovered in Ipswich. It was a terrifying time for Jade Reynolds who worked in the red-light district of Ipswich. The Suffolk Strangler turned out to be Steve Wright, one of her clients

programme.title: Britain's Best Loved Sitcoms

The programme features interviews with genre favourites, including Wendy Craig, Patricia Routledge, Leslie Ash and Alison Steadman, as well as writers and producers

programme.desc: Custom and Border Protection in the Port of Miami calls in a drug-sniffing canine to help zero-in on a potential drug shipment hidden in a container

programme.desc: Scott goes all out to win at an auction, while Lori and Chrissy clash

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Tarrell 'T-Money' Wright makes a shocking revelation, while a group of new bidders comes to town

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike, Frank, Robbie and Danielle all hit the road in search of treasure, to see what the jam-packed yards and barns of Virginia have in store for them

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike, Frank, Danielle and Robbie continue to pick their way through Virginia, but they hit a roadblock when a seller will not let go of a one-of-a-kind item

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Celebrities undertake journeys on some of the most perilous routes in the world. In Alaska, Sue Perkins and Charley Boorman drive along the notorious Dalton Highway, a dirt track originally constructed in the 1970s as a supply road for the Trans-Alaska oil pipeline. The pair struggle to cope with the Arctic conditions and constant threat of avalanches, but receive help from experienced truckers who teach them some unwritten rules for surviving the road's many hazards

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May embark on a road trip, trying to follow the path of the Three Wise Men across the Middle East. However, they opt to do so in open-top sports cars that were built for significantly less demanding tasks than driving along the conflict-ridden mountains of southern Turkey, through war-ravaged Iraq and across the searing deserts of Syria. The trio also try to find out what myrrh is and where it can be bought

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May visit Africa on a mission to find the definitive source of the Nile, the world's longest river, which spans more than 4,000 miles. The trio believe they can do a better job than explorers who claim to have discovered the waterway's starting point by travelling further and faster than previous efforts - but the only tools at their disposal are determination, ingenuity and three ageing estate cars

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania (2012)
programme.desc: Dracula opens a luxury resort for monsters, to provide a refuge from terrified humans. His cosy sanctuary is disrupted when a normal man unwittingly checks in, and the situation is complicated when the unwanted guest takes a liking to the count's daughter. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Team captain David Mitchell is joined by TV presenter Gabby Logan and comedian Andy Hamilton, while his counterpart Lee Mack welcomes Dr Christian Jessen and EastEnder Diane Parish. Host Rob Brydon oversees proceedings on the comedy panel show as the contestants try to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedian Bob Mortimer and actress Patsy Kensit join team captain Lee Mack, while comedy actor Greg Davies and Pointless co-host Richard Osman are enlisted by his counterpart David Mitchell. Rob Brydon oversees proceedings as the two sides engage in a battle of wits to determine which of them can most successfully stretch the truth about their own lives

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Team captain David Mitchell is joined by newsreader Huw Edwards and comedienne Sarah Millican, while his counterpart Lee Mack welcomes actor Bradley Walsh and actress Josie Lawrence. Host Rob Brydon oversees proceedings as the contestants try to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves on the comedy panel show

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy take the children out trick or treating for Halloween, but the night soon turns disastrous for Lee when he loses his mobile on the porch of a spooky Victorian house. After returning to the property to retrieve his phone, Lee discovers that the building is full of secrets that would be far better left undisturbed

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy pop out on a last-minute Christmas Eve mission, leaving their youngsters in the apparently capable hands of Geoffrey - cutting more of a strict and stuffy Victorian gent than usual - and wife Wendy. Alas, things don't quite go to plan for the outward-bound duo, as a theft and unexpected trip into deep countryside await. Not only that, but there are encounters with an aggressive bull in a field and a terrifying truck driver to endure. Meanwhile, back at home, Lee's lovably feckless father Frank turns up to offer gifts - in his own inimitably festive way. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Bobby Ball star

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Ed Byrne, Sara Pascoe, James Acaster and Gary Delaney join regular panellists Hugh Dennis and Andy Parsons to give their irreverent takes on the biggest stories to hit the headlines, through stand-up spots and improvised games. Chaired by Dara O Briain. First aired in 2015

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

Rob Brydon oversees proceedings as the two sides engage in a battle of wits to determine which of them can most successfully stretch the truth about their own lives

programme.title: The Indestructibles
programme.desc: Tim and Gendle become action sport film directors as they realise their dream of creating a Zombie vs Parkour chase scene

programme.title: Rhod Gilbert's Work Experience
programme.desc: The comedian tries his hand at four distinctly unglamorous jobs, beginning by getting up early to sample the life of a refuse collector on the streets of Barry, Vale of Glamorgan

programme.title: Rhod Gilbert's Work Experience
programme.desc: The comedian's quest to sample four distinctly glamourless professions continues as he faces his toughest crowd yet - seven children for whom he becomes mother for a day

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
